, a growing Dutch lifestyle platform for fathers — covering BBQ, craft beer, gadgets, and outdoor gear. We get 12,000+ monthly visitors and work with brands through product reviews and sponsored content.

 outreach, influencer coordination, or brand partnerships

s go out automatically, leads come in automatically. I just need someone reliable to handle the human side: responding to brands, closing deals, and keeping the pipeline organized.

title: English Teacher
description:
Job Title: Online English Teacher — Group & Private Classes (Full or Part-Time)



Company: My Planet English

Location: Remote (Work from home)

Schedule: Weekdays / Weekends / Both — your choice

Pay: $3–$5/hr depending on class type | Up to $500+/month if doing both



---



ABOUT US



My Planet English is a live online English learning platform with adult students worldwide — 3 live group classes and 1 private session every week. We are building our founding team of teachers right now and want people who are serious, reliable, and love teaching.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



We have two teaching streams and you can apply for one or both:



STREAM A — Weekday Group Classes (Monday to Friday)

- 3 group classes per day, 45 minutes each

- Up to 7 students per class

- 3 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $4.50/hr

- Monthly earnings: ~$270–$300/month



STREAM B — Weekend Private Classes (Saturday and Sunday)

- 10 private 1:1 sessions per day, 30 minutes each

- One student per session

- 5 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $2.50 per session

- Monthly earnings: ~$200/month



DO BOTH AND EARN MORE

If you are available on both weekdays and weekends, you can take on both streams and earn $470–$500+/month working from home.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



- Deliver live English classes via our online platform (group or private depending on your stream)

- Follow our curriculum guide and adapt your style to the student level

- Keep sessions engaging, structured, and professional

- Be punctual — our students book in advance and depend on you

- Track basic notes on student progress for continuity



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Native or near-native English speaker

- Experience teaching English online or in person (any level considered)

- TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification is a plus but not required

- Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

- Quiet, professional workspace

- Good quality headset and camera

- Warm, energetic, and reliable.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send your application with the following.



1. A short introduction about your teaching background

2. Which stream you are applying for — Weekday, Weekend, or Both



We are hiring. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

title: ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR
description:
JOB POST FOR THE ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR



At Heritage Career Institute, we are dedicated to advancing healthcare education and preparing the next generation of nursing professionals. Our commitment to academic excellence, innovative teaching methods, and hands-on learning experiences sets the foundation for our students to excel in their nursing careers. 



The ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR for the Practical Nursing Course plays an essential role in delivering structured, high-quality online instruction to PN students. The instructor ensures that students gain the foundational knowledge required for nursing practice while maintaining academic standards and compliance with state and institutional requirements. The instructor will utilize FA Davis, Elsevier, and Populi LMS to deliver lessons, assessments, and student support.



This is a part-time position that requires up to 10 hours per week, depending on the management approval and teaching load. Your permanent Shift will be during the Eastern Standard Time.



Position Summary:



Position:  Online Nursing Instructor

Initial Employment Status: Probationary, Part-Time

Reporting To: Program Director (PN)

Start Date: 1 week after signing the Offer Letter

Work Schedule: Eastern Standard Time (EST) 

Rendering Hours: up to 10 hours per week (depending on the management approval)

Compensation: 175 to 250 pesos per hour (Estimated)



Responsibilities of Online Nursing Instructor

The Online Nursing Instructor for the Practical Nursing Program at Heritage Career Institute plays an essential role in delivering high-quality online education using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi. This role is responsible for teaching PN coursework in a fully virtual environment, facilitating student learning through structured online modules, and ensuring that all instructional content aligns with curriculum and accreditation standards. The Instructor manages online lectures, coursework, assessments, grading timelines, and student academic support while maintaining accurate records within Populi. This includes guiding students through digital resources, monitoring participation, identifying at-risk learners, and providing timely feedback to promote academic success. The Instructor also collaborates with the Program Director to maintain course consistency, improve instructional materials, and support audit and compliance requirements through proper documentation. 



This Job Description will be outlined in detail for you to further understand your role.





ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR

Reports to: Program Director

Collaborates with: Operations, Admissions and Registrar

Primary Focus: Online Delivery of Instruction, Academic Part ONLY

Key Responsibilities:

Online Instruction & Course Management: 

Teach Practical Nursing (PN) subjects through fully online instruction using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi Facilitate virtual lectures, discussions, and interactive learning activities aligned with PN curriculum standards 

Upload, organize course materials follow institutional and accreditation guidelines

Provide clear, constructive, and timely feedback to support student learning and progression Maintain active online engagement and consistent communication with students throughout the course 

Student Support & Engagement: 

Assist PN students in understanding course concepts and navigating online resources 

Respond promptly to student inquiries via

 Monitor academic progress, attendance, and participation to identify at-risk students 



Compliance & Documentation: 

Maintain complete and updated gradebooks, attendance logs, and academic records in LMS Populi Ensure instructional activities meet state, institutional, and accreditation requirements

 Submit syllabi, lesson plans, and assessment documentation for audits and program review 

Adhere to FERPA guidelines and maintain confidentiality of all student information

Participate in mandatory virtual meetings, orientation sessions, and required training 

Collaboration & Continuous Improvement: 

Coordinate with the Program Director to update teaching materials, curriculum alignment, and lesson plans 

Support curriculum enhancement and assist in integrating improved instructional approaches 

Participate in faculty development, evaluations, and continuing education 

Provide input to improve online teaching delivery, student experience, and overall program quality



Qualifications:

Must be a Registered Nurse (RN) with an active, unencumbered Florida RN license (passed the NCLEX-FL)

Minimum of 2 years clinical experience in nursing

Prior teaching or preceptorship experience is highly preferred

Familiarity with FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi or similar learning platforms

Strong knowledge of Practical Nursing curriculum and current nursing practices

Excellent communication skills with the ability to teach, and support students in an online setting

Strong technical proficiency in managing virtual classrooms, and navigating digital content

Ability to provide timely feedback, manage deadlines, and maintain accurate academic records

Detail-oriented, and able to work independently in a remote teaching environment

Must demonstrate professionalism, accountability, and adherence to academic standards

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and general administrative tools. 

Ability to work with minimal supervision and maintain confidentiality.

Ability to work during AM EST hours without any conflicting schedule 

Must NOT engage in any other employment, consulting, or business activity (whether full-time or part-time) that may create a conflict of interest with the Institution. 

Knowledge about Monday.com or Click-up Application is a plus!



Requirements:

Submit a copy of your resume to 

Please make sure that you have read the Position Summary. 

No counter offers will be accepted.

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.

Sportway New Zealand works with sports organisations across New Zealand to deliver live match

streaming and digital content.

We are looking for football-focused individuals based in the Philippines to remotely create match

highlights from recorded games. This role plays an important part in delivering engaging video

content to teams, leagues, and fans.



Role Description

Football Highlights Editors are responsible for identifying and clipping key highlights from football

matches while they are being broadcast live or shortly after completion. This work supports

Sportway’s digital content, social media, team, club and fan engagement outputs.

Highlight clipping typically includes identifying moments such as:

• Goals

• Shots on target

• Key saves

• Penalty incidents

• Red and yellow cards

• Other relevant highlights



Editors will be provided with:

• Access to Sportway’s clipping and production platform

• Training on the highlight clipping workflow

• Ongoing support from Sportway’s operations team



Key Requirements

Applicants should meet the following criteria:

• Strong understanding of football

• Ability to accurately recognise and clip key match moments

• Reliable internet connection

• Comfortable working with computer-based platforms

• Good attention to detail

• Ability to work during New Zealand match times



Availability

Most matches take place on Saturdays and Sundays (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season (March – December).

Editors should be available for several hours during match windows when required.



Compensation

Successful Highlights Editors will be paid 800 PHP per match for highlight clipping duties.

Most matches take place on weekends (Philippine time), with match assignments and schedules

communicated in advance. Training on Sportway’s clipping platform will be provided before work

begins.



Location

This is a remote role. Editors can work from home or any suitable location with a stable internet

connection.

Sportway already operates a support and monitoring team based in Cebu who assist with

operations.



About Sportway

Sportway is a sports technology and broadcast company working with numerous sporting

organisations across New Zealand. Our platform provides live match streaming, performance

analysis tools, and digital content for sporting communities.



Expressions of Interest

Individuals who are interested in this opportunity are invited to submit a short Expression of Interest

outlining the following:

• Your background and involvement in football (e.g. player, coach, referee, analyst, content

creator, supporter, etc.)

• A brief summary of your experience with the sport

• Why you believe you would be well suited to the Football Highlights Editor role

• Confirmation of your availability on Weekends (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season



Expressions of Interest should be sent via
 to:

Mike Craig, JM Liao




: 

sportway



Shortlisted candidates may be invited to complete a short clipping test and onboarding session

with the Sportway team.

title: Real Estate Wholesale Manager
description:
Real Estate Wholesale Manager



Real Estate Transaction Coordinator Virtual Assistant with expertise in Transactions, Compliance, closing processes, administrative support

Responsibilities Ideal Candidate:

Experience closing off market real estate deals, wholesaling, or strong phone sales background

Fluent English 

Strong negotiation skills

Positive attitude, confident energy

Comfortable working independently and remotely

Call  seller leads and buyer leads

Build rapport, confirm motivation, property condition,  asking price and urgency timeline for selling

Negotiate purchase prices and lock up contracts

Update CRM (Google Sheets) daily

Attend quick  check-ins on WhatsApp or zoom as needed

Follow-up with leads as needed

-Appointment Setting

- Call Handling

- Skip Tracing

-
 Management

- Calendar Management

Wholesale Manager to handle cold calling  leads , scheduling appointments, negotiating offers with sellers AND buyers, comping properties,  manage transactions from start to closing. 

Must calculate ARV (after repair value) ,  MAO ( Maximum Allowable Offer)  accurately enough to present to sellers and buyers to make the deal attractive to buyers and sellers.

Only deal with buyers and sellers who want to close fast  (within 30 days)

Only deal with properties in markets that have a large enough spread to accommodate a seller who is happy and committed to the offer price you make them,  an ARV and MAO calculation that has a large enough wholesale fee and enough profit for a buyer to be happy with the deal.

We need great deals BUT they NEED TO BE ACCURATE deals.  

Acquisition and disposition Manager to  negotiate and closing deals between buyers and sellers.

You will supply your own tools and leads from sources you feel comfortable using.

Propstream, Propwire, XLeads, Batchleads, etc.,.  where ever.

You will contact sellers and buyers from markets that are easiest for you to close with best margins. We can discuss this.  If you have experience in this I won't need to elaborate on specific markets.

1 deal = 1 signed seller contract combined with 1 signed buyer contract who is committed to that property. Along with the seller and buyer contracts you will also submit a report of all sold properties, property details, photos (where applicable), comparable properties and all documents associated with each property. 

After you are done with the contracts they will be sent to the title company who takes over the process.

The more successful deals you can bring to the organization the more valuable you will be. 

You need to be goal oriented and to make certain commitments to submit enough deals monthly to consistently improve.

$3-$10/ HR depending on productivity requirements and experience   480-1600/mo range

8 hr/day M-F FT

Please be experienced and do not rely on our limited training.

All contacted applicants will be notified for an introductory zoom call to communicate with each other and confirm understanding of each other's responsibilities before beginning any work.  You will be required to sign off on a terms and conditions agreement that we both need to agree to and submit to escrow company to protect us both.  This ensures that you get paid for your work and we get our documentation and payments.

You will be paid through escrow service to start.    

The payment does not get released to you, the worker, until the title company signs off on a clear title from the seller's property and the buyer is moving forward with the purchase for all deals that you commit to or each deal you successfully complete.  Whatever we agree to. 

This process usually takes less than 7 days for each deal.

Any applicants who ask for payment up front before any work is done to pay for any tools or anything they need to begin working will be automatically disqualified.

These are the terms for the responsibilities.  We encourage all qualified applicants to apply but Please do not apply if you disagree with any of these terms.

title: Guest Support Specialist (Philippines)
description:
Job Title: Guest Support Specialist



Location: Remote/Flexible



About the Company:

At Coho Stays, we specialize in crafting exceptional guest experiences and delivering exceptional value to property owners. As a family-owned and operated short-term rental management company, we manage a growing portfolio of properties across desirable locations. Our focus is on providing personalized service, ensuring every guest has an unforgettable stay while maximizing returns for our clients. We embrace innovation and technology to deliver seamless management and hospitality solutions. Join us in reshaping the future of vacation rentals with a passionate, dedicated team.



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Short-Term Rental Administrator to manage guest communication and ensure smooth operations for our rental properties. The ideal candidate will be tech-savvy, have strong customer service skills, and be capable of handling various administrative duties using digital tools to maintain our high standards.



Responsibilities: 

Guest communication: Serve as the primary point of contact for guests, promptly responding to inquiries, booking requests, and concerns via
, messaging platforms, and phone. 

Answer questions from current, incoming, and inquiring guests using our property management (Hospitable)

Ensure all guests have received their access codes prior to arriving at the property

Respond to guests requiring assistance gaining access to the property

Give recommendations of places to eat and things to do that are relevant to the guest using our canned responses

Coordination with Cleaning and Maintenance Teams: Schedule cleanings and maintenance tasks to ensure properties are always guest-ready. Communicate effectively with vendors to ensure timely completion. Manage the cleaning and supplies.

Review cleaning schedule on a daily and weekly basis

Verify cleaners arrive by 12:30pm EST

Review photos from cleaners to ensure property is complete

Manage supplies and reorder when needed

Property Listings: Assist in keeping property listings up-to-date across platforms, including updating descriptions, photos, and pricing.

Guest Experience: Provide personalized recommendations, answer questions about the property or local area, and ensure guest satisfaction from check-in to check-out.

Booking Management: Oversee reservation calendars, update bookings, and handle modifications as needed.

Issue Resolution: Address and resolve any issues that arise during a guest’s stay in a timely and professional manner.

Administrative Duties: Track bookings, payments, and maintenance schedules; document and report any property issues.

Review property camera recordings for property health and guest compliance.

Order routine supplies to replenish property amenities.

Process all vendor payments 

Prepare weekly expense reports

Preparing monthly owner reports

Ad-hoc projects which may involve Process Improvement, Tool andAsset Creation.



Results:

Maintain a review rating of 4.8 or higher (8 or higher on Booking.com)

Maintain 100% response rate of 15 min or less to all inquiries

Maintain response time of 12 minutes or less for all inquiries 



Requirements:

Prior experience in guest support with Airbnb 

Very strong written and spoken English language

Extreme attention to detail

Outstanding customer service

Excellent typing including speed and accuracy

Proactive problem-solver with a positive attitude. Ability to problem solve, multitask and manage time efficiently in a fast-paced environment.

Detail-oriented with excellent organizational skills.

Read critically

Ability to work with multiple technology platforms like Google Drive, Monday.com, Trello, Google Docs, Google Sheets, WhatsApp

Tech-savvy with experience using tools like Google Sheets, Trello, Slack, and property management software (Airbnb, VRBO, etc.).

Previous experience in customer service or hospitality is preferred.

Geographic region: South American

Spoken languages: Spanish and English

Work Schedule: Wednesdays, 5pm-10pm US Eastern Time Zone

Alternating weekends Saturday and Sundays,  5pm-10pm US Eastern Time Zone

Schedule flexibility and willingness to trade shifts with other employees, as needed



Why Join Us?:

Flexible work environment.

Be part of a growing company in the vacation rental industry.

Opportunities for growth and development.

If you’re passionate about hospitality, love helping people, and have a knack for using digital tools to keep things running smoothly, we’d love to have you on our team!

Produce characters, icons, and simple diagrams for YouTube videos

Accurately follow and replicate established visual styles

Prepare layered files optimized for animation (e.g., for After Effects)

Handle revisions and iterative production tasks

Maintain consistency across all visual outputs

Basic experience in digital illustration

Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and/or Photoshop

Ability to follow instructions precisely and reproduce designs accurately

Experience with simple, flat, and minimal design styles

Basic understanding of layer organization and asset separation

Basic English reading comprehension



? Ideal Candidate

Detail-oriented and able to work efficiently

Comfortable following structured guidelines and rules

Responsive to feedback and revisions

Reliable and consistent in output quality

Able to maintain steady production over time



? Employment Details

Monthly Salary: 20,000 PHP (starting rate)

Working Hours: Full-time (approx. 40 hours/week)

Location: Remote



? Performance & Compensation Review



This position starts with a base salary.

Compensation may be reviewed and adjusted based on performance and output.



Evaluation criteria include:



Production speed and ability to meet deadlines

Quality and accuracy of execution

Consistency and reliability over time



Salary adjustments and role expansion will be discussed individually based on performance.



? Expected Output (Scope & Volume)



? Monthly Production (Estimated)

Approximately 60–120 assets per month

Examples:

Simple icons: 8–15 per day

Basic characters: 3–6 per day

Simple diagrams: 2–3 per day



? Video Output Equivalent

Approx. 2–3 videos worth of assets per month



Assumes clear guidelines and structured direction are provided.



? Quality Expectations

Simple, flat-style illustrations

Limited color palette (typically 3–5 colors)

Accurate reproduction of provided styles and layouts

Properly layered files suitable for animation



? Not Required

Concept development or ideation

Complex visual design or advanced illustration

Independent creative direction

Please submit the following:



Portfolio (required)

Simple illustrations and diagram work are preferred

Tools you use

Estimated daily production capacity

This is an execution-focused role, not a concept design position.



We are looking for someone who can:

Follow instructions precisely

Deliver consistent output

Work efficiently at scale

title: Architectural Visualizer (Part-Time, Long-Term) — SketchUp + Enscape — U.S. Real Estate
description:
I'm a U.S.-based commercial and residential real estate broker (Dallas, expanding to NY and LA). I underwrite multifamily and commercial deals where ADU additions and interior unit renovations create the value-add story. I need ONE skilled architectural visualizer for these renderings on a per-project basis, ongoing, on-call. This is a long-term, part-time role.



WHAT YOU'LL PRODUCE PER DEAL

- Massing + site plan showing ADU additions on existing parcels

- Floor plans for proposed ADUs (typical 400–1,200 sf, 1–2 BR)

- Exterior renders (2–4 angles) — photoreal, contextual, no stock people

- Interior renovation renders — kitchens, baths, living spaces with new finish palettes (LVP, quartz, fixtures, paint)

- Source files: .skp + render project files



WHAT MAKES THIS EASY FOR YOU

You do NOT need to know U.S. zoning. Every deal comes with a one-page brief:

- Property address, parcel APN, Google Earth screenshot

- All zoning constraints pre-translated: setbacks, max height, lot coverage, FAR, parking — exact numbers

- Scope checklist: ADU / interior / both

- Aesthetic references — Pinterest board plus 3–5 image links per deal

- Deliverables list and deadline



REQUIRED SKILLS

- SketchUp Pro — fast, clean modeling

- Enscape, D5, Lumion, or Twinmotion — photoreal output

- Photoshop — touch-up, sky replacement, contextual collage

- Interior design sensibility — you can build a finish palette from a reference image, not just model what I tell you

- AutoCAD or Revit basics for cleaner floor plans (preferred)

- Strong written English



AESTHETIC DIRECTION

Calm, restrained, editorial. Reference the energy of The Local Project, AD, Listed Nest LA. Warm natural light, real materials, no oversaturated marketing-render look. No people unless requested. Output should belong in a high-end OM, not a SketchUp tutorial.



ENGAGEMENT

- Part-time, long-term position (not project-by-project)

- $600–$800/month base, paid weekly via Wise

- ~20 hours/week, 2-hour daily overlap with U.S. Central Time

- Bonus: $50 per OM-feature render published, plus closing bonus on funded deals

- 13th month pay after 12 months. Paid Philippine holidays.



PAID TEST

$75 flat for a real-deal test: site plan, 2 ADU exterior renders, 1 interior renovation render. Best output wins the ongoing relationship.



WHEN APPLYING, INCLUDE

1. Portfolio link — show real estate / multifamily / residential, not corporate

2. 3 favorite past projects with brief context

3. Your software stack and typical turnaround

4. Confirm the aesthetic direction matches your sensibility

5. Use the word "palette" in your application so I know you read this



Skip generic "expert in 3D rendering" applications — they'll be auto-rejected.

title: AI Operations Manager | Peptide Telehealth & Aesthetic Consulting Agency
description:
**JOB TITLE:** Elite Virtual Assistant — AI Operations Manager | Peptide Telehealth & Aesthetic Consulting Agency





**LOCATION:** Remote | US-Based Company | Michigan



---



**TO APPLY: Your first line must say "Operator Ready" — any application without this exact phrase is automatically deleted. No exceptions.**



---



## About Us



We are building two simultaneously growing businesses in the peptide telehealth and AI consulting space. Our first business is a peptide telehealth network and licensed provider platform connecting compounding pharmacies with medical spas across the United States. Our second business is an AI consulting agency serving medical spa owners — we build AI chatbots, booking automation, content systems, and growth infrastructure for aesthetic practices.



We are targeting $1M in revenue within 12 months across three revenue engines — telehealth subscriptions, medspa network memberships, and peptide distribution margins.



This is a ground floor opportunity. You will not be answering
s and scheduling meetings. You will be building a company alongside the founder and thinking like an owner every single day.



---



## Who We Are NOT Looking For



- Someone who needs to be told what to do every hour

- Someone who treats this like a part time side gig

- Someone who has never used AI tools professionally

- Someone who needs a script for every situation

- Someone who has never worked in healthcare or wellness



---



## Who We ARE Looking For



We need an operator. Someone who reads a goal and figures out how to get there. Someone who sees a problem before the founder does and solves it before being asked. Someone who thinks in systems, builds processes, and uses AI to multiply their output by 10x.



You must have hands-on experience with Claude AI specifically. Not just ChatGPT. We use Claude for content creation, business strategy, outreach writing, SOPs, and client communication. If you have never used Claude you will not succeed in this role.



You must think like a business owner — not an employee. Every task you complete should move us closer to revenue.



---



## Your Core Responsibilities



**AI Operations (Daily):**

- Use Claude AI to draft outreach
s, SOPs, content, client proposals, and scripts

- Use ChatGPT, 
, and Zapier to build automations that eliminate repetitive tasks

- Use GoHighLevel or HubSpot to manage all CRM pipelines

- Use HeyGen or Pictory to create AI-powered video content for Instagram

- Use Notion to build and maintain the company operating system

- Research and implement new AI tools that improve speed and output

- Report weekly on what was automated and how much time was saved



**Business Setup and Operations (Week 1–2):**

- Verify Michigan LLC status and organize all legal documents

- Set up complete Google Workspace including Gmail, Drive, and shared folders

- Build HubSpot CRM with pipelines for pharmacy partners, medspa leads, and telehealth patients

- Research and build a list of 50 medspas across Michigan and surrounding states with owner name,
, phone, and Instagram handle

- Research licensed 503B compounding pharmacies and compile provider account application requirements

- Build complete Notion operating system with SOPs, task trackers, contact databases, and weekly dashboards



**Pharmacy and Medspa Outreach (Week 2–4):**

- Send 10 personalized cold outreach
s daily to medspa owners using Claude-written templates

- Send 10 Instagram DMs daily to medspa owners using approved scripts

- Follow up with every lead on a structured schedule — day 3, day 7, day 14

- Track every conversation in HubSpot with notes, next steps, and follow-up dates

- Book discovery calls directly onto the founder's calendar using Calendly

- Apply for provider accounts at all target pharmacies



**AI Consulting Operations (Week 2 Ongoing):**

- Build AI chatbot demos using Voiceflow or Manychat for medspa prospects

- Research and document AI tools relevant to medspa operations

- Create client onboarding systems including welcome
s, shared folders, and 30-day deliverable timelines

- Build service menu one-pagers and proposal decks in Canva

- Develop and maintain a content library of approved scripts, captions, and
 templates



**Telehealth Platform Support (Week 2 Ongoing):**

- Research HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms and compile feature and pricing comparisons

- Support patient intake process setup

- Build patient onboarding
 sequences in GoHighLevel

- Track FDA regulatory updates on peptide reclassification

- Compile compliance resources including COA requirements and state-specific telehealth regulations



**Instagram and Content Operations (Daily):**

- Post one piece of content daily across both business accounts

- Write all captions using Claude AI in approved brand voice

- Use CapCut or HeyGen to create or edit video content

- Respond to all comments within 1 hour

- Send 10 DMs per day to targeted medspa owners

- Track follower growth, engagement rate, and DM response rate weekly

- Report content performance every Friday



---



## Tools You Must Know Before Applying



**Non-negotiable:**

- Claude AI

- ChatGPT

- Google Workspace

- Canva

- Notion

- HubSpot or GoHighLevel

- Calendly

- Instagram content posting and DM outreach

**Strong bonus:**

- 
 or Zapier

- HeyGen or Pictory

- Voiceflow or Manychat

- Any telehealth platform experience

- GoHighLevel full platform experience



---



## Your 30-Day Performance Targets



| Week | Target |

|------|--------|

| **Week 1** | LLC verified, CRM built, 50 medspa leads compiled, pharmacy research complete, Notion OS live |

| **Week 2** | Outreach started, 100
s sent, 5 pharmacy applications submitted, Instagram posting daily, first calls booked |

| **Week 3** | 3 discovery calls completed, AI chatbot demo built, telehealth platform comparison delivered |

| **Week 4** | First medspa network member signed OR first telehealth patient onboarded, full operating system running independently |



---



## Compensation and Growth Path



**Starting:** $400–$500/month — 20 hours per week



**Day 31 — if targets are hit:**

- Promoted to full time Operations Manager

- 40 hours per week

- Salary increase to $800–$1,200/month

- Bonus structure tied to revenue milestones

- Equity conversation at $500K revenue



This is not a job. This is a career. If you help build this company you will be rewarded like someone who helped build it.



---



## How to Apply



 [your
 address] with the subject line: **"Operator Ready — [Your Name]"**



Your application must include:



1. The phrase **"Operator Ready"** as your very first line

2. A 5-sentence paragraph on why you are the right operator — be specific not generic

3. Your resume showing relevant experience

4. A list of every AI tool you have used with one sentence on how you used each one

5. Your answer to this question: *"We need to sign our first 5 medspa clients in 30 days. Walk me through exactly what you would do in week 1."*

6. Your available hours, time zone, and earliest start date



**Applications missing any of the above will not receive a response.**



---



## Paid Trial Test — Top 3 Finalists Only ($30 paid)



**Task 1 — AI Operations (1 hour)**

Use Claude AI to write a 3
 cold outreach sequence targeting medspa owners. Initial outreach, day 3 follow up, and day 7 follow up. Each
 under 150 words with a clear call to action.



**Task 2 — Research and CRM (1 hour)**

Find 10 medspas in Michigan with owner name,
, Instagram handle, and phone number. Enter all into HubSpot with a pipeline called "Medspa Outreach" with these stages: New Lead ? Contacted ? Call Scheduled ? Proposal Sent ? Closed Won.



**Task 3 — Notion Operating System (45 min)**

Build a Notion workspace with these sections: Pharmacy Partners, Medspa Pipeline, Telehealth Patients, Content Calendar, Weekly Tasks, and SOPs. Populate each with sample content.



**Task 4 — AI Video (15 min)**

Use HeyGen, Canva, or CapCut to create one 30-second video script and either record it or show the finished edit. Topic: "Why your medspa needs peptide therapy in 2026."



---



## Interview Questions for Finalists



1. "You wake up Monday and I am unreachable for 48 hours. You have 10 medspa leads waiting for follow up, 3 pharmacy applications to submit, and Instagram hasn't been posted in 2 days. Walk me through exactly what you do."

2. "How have you personally used Claude AI in a past role? Give me a specific example with results."

3. "What is one automation you would build in week 1 using 
 or Zapier to save us time?"

4. "We need to sign our first medspa client in 14 days. What is your plan?"

5. "What do you know about the peptide telehealth industry and FDA regulatory changes in 2026?"



---



## Instant Disqualification



- Missing the "Operator Ready" phrase

- Generic application that could apply to any job

- Cannot name specific AI tools used

- Takes more than 12 hours to respond during hiring

- Cannot complete the trial task independently



---



We are building something real in a multi-billion dollar industry that is about to explode after a major FDA ruling in July 2026. The person who gets this role will look back in 12 months and say this was the best career decision they ever made.



If that is you — apply now.

title: Video Editor — Talking-Head YouTube (Long-Form) + Instagram Reels (Short-Form)
description:
What we make

We teach the hardest topics in nursing school — cardiac, ABGs, electrolytes, prioritization, NCLEX strategy. Our voice is real-talk, not toxic-positivity ("the test is hard, you're not stupid, here's the trick that actually works"). Think NurseInTheMaking energy, but sharper edits and tighter hooks. We're scaling content fast. YouTube long-form is launching now (Video 1 in post). Instagram reels are running on a "trainbloom" mid-thought open / line-per-breath teleprompter format with on-screen text directions baked in.



What you'll do

Long-form YouTube (1–2 per week)

8–15 minute talking-head videos, mostly studio footage from a Sony ZV-E10 II (4K 30p, S-Cinetone)

Trim filler, tighten pacing, layer B-roll (we provide a B-roll pack), add on-screen text emphasis, lower thirds, chapter markers

Build a pattern interrupt every 15–20 seconds (cuts, zooms, graphics, sound design)

Captions burned in + uploaded SRT



Short-form Instagram Reels (3–5 per week)

30–60 second cutdowns from long-form OR standalone teleprompter reels

Trainbloom-style edit: hard mid-thought open, no intro, every line snaps, on-screen text reinforces every beat

Hook on screen by frame 2, payoff by second 25, no lazy CTA

Vertical 9:16, captions, native-feeling pacing (we don't want it to look "edited" — we want it to look inevitable)





You're a fit if

You've edited 50+ talking-head videos for a creator/coach/educator in the last 12 months

You have a portfolio with at least 3 long-form YouTube edits AND 3 reels you cut yourself (links, not screenshots)

You're fluent in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve for long-form, and CapCut or Premiere for shorts

After Effects skill is a plus (we use animated text emphasis + simple kinetic typography)

You actually watch educational creators on YouTube and IG — you can name 3 nursing/medical/test-prep creators whose edits you respect and tell me what they do well

You can turn around a long-form edit in 3–5 days and a reel in 24–48 hours

You communicate in writing fast and clearly (
/async-first)



You're NOT a fit if

You need hand-holding on creative direction every step

Your portfolio is mostly wedding videos, brand commercials, or motion graphics reels (different muscle)

You "do everything" — I'd rather hire someone obsessed with talking-head educational content specifically

You ghost for 4 days on a revision



Deliverables per month:  4 long-form videos | 15–20 short-form videos



Compensation:  $1k across 4 months / $250-$300 a month

title: Virtual assistant phone caller, send emails
description:
# NOW HIRING: Virtual Assistant / Phone Caller

**Malibu Slimm Films LLC — AI Video Production & Special Effects**

## About the Company

We serve production companies, digital studios, music video directors, advertising agencies, and streaming platforms nationwide — delivering studio-level visual results at independent film budgets.



We are fiscally sponsored by From the Heart Foundation and are actively expanding our vendor partnerships across the country.



**Website:**

You will spend one entire month (four weeks straight) focused exclusively on Campaign 1, then the following entire month (four weeks straight) focused exclusively on Campaign 2. Campaigns alternate month to month until further notice. Depending on how well a campaign performs, we may choose to remain on it for an additional month — this will be determined and communicated to you in advance. If any other change or switch is needed at any point, you will be informed ahead of time. All scripts, contact lists,
 templates, and links for both campaigns will be provided to you in advance.



---

 templates, portfolio links, and campaign materials for both campaigns will be fully provided by the company. You will never need to research your own leads or create your own content for either campaign. You simply follow the system provided.

You will be calling on behalf of our Founder, Jonathan Slack, to introduce our services, build relationships with decision-makers, and generate leads. You will alternate between campaigns every two weeks — full details, scripts, and contact lists for both are provided.



This is not a high-pressure sales job. This is relationship-building and introduction work. You will be given full phone scripts, call trackers, pre-researched contact lists,
 templates, and all necessary links — everything you need to succeed from day one with zero guesswork.

s when contacts are unavailable

s to the contact list in addition to phone calls — all

s sent, voi
s left, and leads generated

s sent on behalf of Malibu Slimm Films LLC will be monitored and reviewed for quality assurance. By accepting this position you agree to this condition.

- Advertising and marketing agencies

- Corporate video production companies

- Streaming platform vendor departments



You will be provided with a pre-built list of production companies nationwide — including verified direct phone numbers,
s, and contact notes — organized by region and category. You will never need to find your own leads.



---



## What We're Looking For



**Required:**

- Clear, confident, and professional phone presence

- Fluent in English (spoken and written)

- Comfortable making cold calls and talking to business professionals

- Able to follow a script naturally without sounding robotic

- Strong organizational skills — you must log every call accurately

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

- Basic
 proficiency (Gmail or similar)

- Self-motivated and consistent — you set your own pace within daily minimums



**Preferred (Not Required):**

- Previous experience in phone sales, appointment setting, or customer service

- Familiarity with the film, video production, or entertainment industry

- Experience with CRM tools or call log spreadsheets

- Bilingual a plus



---



## What We Provide You



? Complete phone script — no guessing, no improvising required

? Pre-built contact list of companies with verified phone numbers and
s

? Follow-up
 template ready to copy and send

? Call log tracker — simple spreadsheet format

? Full company portfolio and one-sheet to reference or send

? Onboarding call with Jonathan Slack before your first day

? Ongoing support and feedback



---



## Compensation & Job Security



- **Hourly Rate:** $1.65 per hour starting rate

- **Hours:** 4 hours per day, 5–6 days per week

- **Weekly Earnings:** Approximately $33–$39.60 per week guaranteed

- **Commission Bonus:** Additional pay for every lead that converts into a signed contract

- **Performance-Based Pay Increases:** Your hourly rate will increase based on your performance, consistency, and results — the better you perform, the more you earn

- **This is a Permanent Position:** This is not a short-term gig. You are being hired for a stable, ongoing remote role that will run every month for the next 12 months minimum

- **Job Stability:** As long as you meet expectations, your position is secure for the full 12-month period — this is consistent, reliable work you can count on month after month

- **Payment Method:** To be discussed at time of offer (PayPal, Wise, Zelle, or direct deposit)



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. If you show up consistently, follow the system, and deliver results — your pay will reflect that. This is a permanent role with real opportunity for growth.



---



## Daily Expectations



| Expectation | Minimum |

|---|---|

| Outbound calls per day | 20 |

| Outbound
s sent per day | 1 per call + additional
 blasts as assigned |

| Follow-up
s sent | 1 per call |

| Call log entries completed | Every call |

| Hot leads flagged to Jonathan | Same day |

| Daily report submitted | End of each shift |



---



## How to Apply



Send the following to 
 with the subject line: **VA/Phone Caller Application**



Please include:



1. Your name and contact information

2. A brief description of your phone/sales experience (2–3 sentences is fine)

3. A voice memo or short audio recording of yourself introducing our company using the opener below — this is required and replaces a traditional cover letter:



> *"Hi, my name is [YOUR NAME] and I'm calling on behalf of Jonathan Slack at Malibu Slimm Films — we're an AI video production and special effects company based in California. I'll keep it brief — do you have about 90 seconds?"*



4. Your available start date and weekly availability



---



## Questions?



Call or text Jonathan directly at **
** or
 



We look forward to hearing from you.



---



*Malibu Slimm Films LLC — Fiscally Sponsored by From the Heart Foundation*

title: Google Ads Strategist for Shopify DTC Food & Wellness Brand
description:
Inspired Trading is looking for an experienced Google Ads Strategist to help grow our Shopify e-commerce store.



We are a Jamaican-owned e-commerce brand selling authentic Jamaican products, including herbal teas, wellness products, spices, sauces, sweets, and specialty grocery items to customers in the United States and other markets.



We are looking for someone who understands how to use Google Ads to launch and grow direct-to-consumer food, wellness, and specialty grocery products.



This is not a basic “run ads” role. We need someone who can think strategically, work with a small business budget, troubleshoot campaigns, review product feeds, improve tracking, and help us build a profitable Google Ads program for Shopify.



The right person will be practical, analytical, honest, and able to explain Google Ads clearly to a business owner.



About the Brand



Inspired Trading brings authentic Jamaican products to customers who love Caribbean food, traditional herbal teas, island-inspired wellness, and specialty grocery items.



Our product range includes:



Jamaican herbal teas

Women’s and men’s wellness teas

Jamaican sauces and spices

Specialty grocery items

Jamaican sweets and snacks

Seasonal gift items and bundles



We are now focused on growing our Shopify direct-to-consumer sales and reducing our dependence on marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, and Etsy.



Minimum Experience Required



Applicants must have:



Minimum 3 years of hands-on Google Ads experience

Experience managing Google Ads for Shopify or e-commerce brands

Experience with Google Merchant Center

Experience with Shopping campaigns

Experience with Performance Max campaigns

Experience with Search campaigns

Experience checking or troubleshooting conversion tracking

Experience working with small or medium-sized business budgets



Experience with food, beverage, grocery, wellness, herbal products, natural products, or DTC consumer brands is strongly preferred.



Responsibilities



The Google Ads Strategist will help us:



Create a practical Google Ads strategy for Shopify sales

Recommend which products, bundles, and offers to advertise

Plan campaigns for DTC food, herbal tea, wellness, and grocery products

Set up and optimize Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns

Review Google Merchant Center and product feed issues

Check product titles, descriptions, categories, and feed quality

Review and troubleshoot conversion tracking

Monitor search terms and add negative keywords

Work within an SME budget and reduce wasted ad spend

Troubleshoot campaigns that get clicks but no sales

Review landing pages, offers, pricing, and product selection

Provide simple weekly reports with clear recommendations

Help develop a 30-day and 90-day Google Ads growth plan

What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who can answer questions like:



Which products should we advertise first and why?

How would you launch a new DTC food product using Google Ads?

Should we start with Search, Shopping, Performance Max, or a combination?

How would you structure campaigns for a small budget?

What would you do if a campaign is getting clicks but no conversions?

How would you know whether the issue is the ad, product, offer, landing page, price, tracking, or audience?

How would you approach seasonal campaigns such as Mother’s Day, Christmas, Black Friday, and Caribbean holiday gifting?



We want someone who can think commercially, not just manage buttons inside Google Ads.



First Assignment



The first assignment will be a structured review of our Google Ads and Shopify setup.



You may be asked to provide:



Google Ads account audit

Conversion tracking check

Google Merchant Center review

Product feed recommendations

Recommended campaign structure

Priority products to advertise

Suggested starting budget

Troubleshooting notes

30-day action plan

90-day growth roadmap

Application Instructions



To apply, please start your application with this phrase:



“I have 3+ years of Google Ads experience.”



Applications that do not include this phrase may not be reviewed.



Please include the following:



Your updated resume or CV

A short summary of your Google Ads experience

Examples of Shopify or e-commerce campaigns you have worked on

Your answers to the screening questions below

Your hourly rate

Your weekly availability



Please answer in your own words. We are not looking for ChatGPT-generated or copy-and-paste responses. We want genuine answers based on your real experience.



Applications without a resume/CV and complete answers to the screening questions will not be reviewed.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Remote Construction Project Manager — Boutique Hospitality Build
description:
About the Project                                                           

                                                                                

  We are building a small-footprint, high-end hospitality property in the       

  Northeast US. The owner is acting as general contractor. We're hiring a remote

   part-time Construction Project Manager to be the project office — keeping    

  schedule, money, and procurement on track so the owner can spend his time   

  on-site and with subcontractors, not chasing paperwork.



  What You'll Do



  - Schedule: Build and maintain the master schedule.     

  Sequence trades, track critical path, flag slips early.

  - Bid leveling: Run apples-to-apples comparisons across subcontractor bids    

  (excavation, framing, electrical, plumbing, deck, pools, etc.). Surface scope 

  gaps.                                        

  - Sub coordination: Manage mobilization dates, RFIs, change orders, punch     

  lists. Draft clear, professional
s, make phone calls, text to US-based subs.                     

  - Procurement: Track lead times, deposits, and delivery windows for structural

   materials, modular elements, fixtures, and FF&E from US and overseas         

  suppliers.                                                                  

  - Document control: Organize drawings, RFIs, submittals, and inspection       

  reports in Google Drive with clean, consistent naming.                        

  - Cost tracking: Maintain a running tally vs. the project budget by line item.

   Flag overages before they compound.                                          

  - Site documentation review: Review weekly photos/video from the field for  

  quality and completeness.                                                     

  - Invoice review & AP: Verify vendor invoices against scope, flag           

  discrepancies, queue for owner approval.                                      

  - Sourcing coordination including international (China) sourcing if you have

  that experience.                                                              

                                                                              

  You're a Strong Fit If You Have                                               

                                                                              

  - 2+ years of construction management, project engineering, architecture, or  

  civil engineering experience                                                

  - A degree in construction management, civil engineering, or architecture     

  - Worked on US-based commercial or high-end residential projects              

  - Solid familiarity with US building products and conventions — dimensional   

  lumber, framing standards, mechanical/electrical/plumbing systems             

  - A track record of sequencing trades and spotting critical-path risk         

  - Strong written English — you'll draft RFI
s, sub instructions, and     

  weekly status reports                                                         

  - A bias toward proposing solutions, not just flagging problems                    

                                                                                

  Tools                                                                         

                                                                                

  Google Drive · Slack ·
  

                                                                                

  ---                                                                         

  To Apply                                     

          

  Please include all of the following — applications missing any item will be

  skipped:                                                                      

   

  1. The word STARGAZER at the top of your reply (confirms you read this        

  carefully).                                                                 

  2. A 2–3 paragraph intro covering: your construction background, the most     

  complex project you've coordinated, and one specific example of a sequencing, 

  sourcing, or cost issue you caught and solved.

  3. A link or attachment to a work sample — a schedule,  

  bid leveling sheet, RFI log, cost-tracking workbook, or weekly status report  

  you've actually produced.                                                                       

  Generic copy-paste applications, AI-generated cover letters, or replies       

  missing the code word will be discarded.

title: Reddit + X researcher / writer — long-term, $1,000+/mo
description:
I run a couple of SaaS products (you'll work on Flipbooker to start, and grow into others) and need help with online research and engagement. The work is varied, expect different things most days:



Find old Reddit threads where my product is actually a good answer to someone's question, and write a thoughtful comment. I have a tool that drafts these in my voice (or your voice, if that turns out to be better)... your job is to read what it spits out, d
 if it's any good, edit it until it sounds human, and post it. Or skip it if the thread isn't worth it.

Engage in real conversations on X where I/my platform would have something useful to add

Craft captions and hooks for short-form videos that one of my platforms can help create

Crafting interesting lead lists in Exa.ai websets for our sales guys (it's a search tool, which I'll teach you, easy to learn)

Tell me weekly what's working and what isn't so we can reassess



What I actually need from you:



English that reads like you grew up online in the US, trolling reddit for silly stuff. Not "I scored well on IELTS" English, but the kind where you've been on Reddit or other internet forums for years and you can tell when a comment sounds like ChatGPT wrote it. Maybe you go "ugh, not another AI post" - that probably means you have the taste.

You're already on the internet a lot for fun. You know what subreddits are. You know the difference between how people write on r/AskReddit vs. r/personalfinance. You've laughed at 
s this week, and maybe know too many of them.

Judgment. You can tell when a thread is worth replying to vs. when it would feel artificial and get removed for astroturfing. You can tell when an AI draft sounds robotic and make it funny or more helpful.

You actually pay attention to writing. You notice when a sentence is slightly off.

You'll tell me honestly when something isn't working instead of pretending it is.



I don't care about your degree, agency experience, or follower count. I care how you think and write.



To apply, do this:



Find a Reddit post from at least 6 months ago where someone asked a question you actually know the answer to. Anything... it could be cooking, fitness, tech, parenting, doesn't matter.

Write a
word reply that would actually help them. Write it yourself. Do not use AI. I will know, and besides I really want to see how you think, so robots thinking like robots doesn't help us here.

Send me: the link to the original post, your would-be reply pasted as text, and one or two sentences on why you picked that thread and that reply style.



No task = I won't reply. AI-written reply... I probably won't reply, unless somehow I miss it AND your task result is great. 



I'm not a typical hierarchy driven business owner - I want your real thoughts, your real opinions, and for you to challenge my thoughts when you think they are wrong, or help me figure things out. 



I also, with that said, will sometimes have things that I DO really need one in some specific way, and I'll let you know WHY if so, not just saying 'trust me' or 'I'm the boss'.



Pay:



$1,000-1,200/mo to start, 30-40 hrs/week, depending on the writing sample and how I expect this to work 

Paid biweekly via Wise (and if you prefer the Payoneer thing onlinejobs does, we can talk about it)

Ideally, this will be a long-term thing - if we make it to end of year, you'll get a full 13th-month bonus (a full-month's pay) - not pro-rated, even though this post is going up in May. I like it when people like working with me.

title: Executive Assistant VA
description:
We are hiring a full-scope Executive / Virtual Assistant who can function as the operational right hand of the CEO. This is not a single-function VA role. You will touch almost every part of the business — from managing the executive calendar to filing Amazon cases, booking tradeshow booths, reconciling invoices, and communicating with customers. If you thrive on variety, move quickly, and take initiative without being asked twice, this role was built for you.



Responsibilities

Executive & C-Suite Support

• Manage CEO
 inbox — triage, draft responses, flag urgent items, and ensure zero dropped balls

• Own calendar management: schedule meetings, protect focus blocks, coordinate across time zones

• Prepare agendas, meeting notes, and follow-up action items

• Handle confidential correspondence and sensitive business communications with discretion

• Research, compile briefing documents, and prepare talking points ahead of important calls

• Coordinate tasks across internal tea
mbers and external vendors on behalf of the CEO



Customer Service

• Serve as a primary point of contact for inbound customer inquiries via
, Amazon messaging, Walmart messaging, and web forms

• Handle order status questions, shipping inquiries, product questions, and complaints professionally

• Issue replacements, initiate refunds, and follow return/exchange SOPs

• Escalate complex or high-value issues to the appropriate tea
mber with a full written summary

• Maintain response time targets (Amazon 24-hour SLA and Walmart 48-hour SLA)

• Document recurring customer issues and flag patterns to the team



Amazon & Walmart Seller Operations - You will be a backup to this team in house already

• Monitor Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Seller Central dashboards daily

• Open, track, and follow up on Amazon support cases (listing issues, stranded inventory, suppressed listings, reimbursement claims)

• Process FBM orders and coordinate shipment confirmations

• Manage buyer-seller messaging; respond to feedback and reviews per policy

• Monitor account health metrics and flag anomalies

• Assist with listing maintenance: updating copy, images, pricing, and backend keywords as directed

• Support Walmart Seller Central operations including order management and case filing



Order Processing & Sales Support

• Receive and process incoming B2B purchase orders via
, phone, and CRM

• Enter orders into QuickBooks and Method CRM with accuracy

• Confirm order details with customers and communicate estimated ship dates

• Coordinate with warehouse/logistics on order fulfillment and shipping timelines

• Follow up on open quotes and outstanding proposals

• Maintain organized records of all orders and correspondence



Logistics & Shipping Coordination

• Work with freight carriers, 3PLs, and ShipStation to coordinate domestic and international shipments

• Obtain and compare freight quotes for LTL and FTL shipments

• Track shipments and proactively communicate delays to customers and the team

• Process bills of lading, freight invoices, and carrier paperwork

• Assist with FBA shipment creation, box content files, and label compliance

• Support claims for lost, damaged, or delayed freight shipments



Tradeshow & Event Management

• Research and identify relevant industry tradeshows, expos, and conferences

• Complete exhibitor applications and secure booth reservations by deadlines

• Manage all tradeshow logistics: booth shipping, drayage, setup orders, lead retrieval rentals

• Coordinate exhibitor services including electricity, Wi-Fi, furniture, and A/V

• Track all show-related deadlines (early bird pricing, badge registrations, shipping cutoffs)

• Build and maintain a tradeshow calendar with cost tracking and ROI notes

• Compile post-show lead lists and initiate follow-up sequences in Method CRM and SalesAPE



Travel Booking & Itinerary Management

• Book domestic and international flights, hotels, rental cars, and ground transportation

• Build detailed travel itineraries with confirmations, maps, and logistics notes 

• Monitor flight changes and proactively rebook when disruptions occur

• Manage loyalty program accounts and maximize points/miles where possible

• Reconcile travel expenses and submit receipts to accounting



Accounting & Finance Support

• Enter vendor bills and purchase orders into QuickBooks Desktop with proper coding

• Reconcile credit card statements against receipts and flag discrepancies

• Process accounts payable — match invoices to POs and route for approval

• Generate and send customer invoices for B2B accounts

• Follow up on past-due receivables with professional collection communications

• Pull reports from QuickBooks as directed (P&L, A/R aging, A/P aging, sales by customer)

• Assist with month-end close tasks and document collection



Inventory Reporting & Management

• Pull and distribute weekly inventory reports across Amazon FBA, Walmart, and warehouse locations

• Monitor FBA reorder points and flag low-stock SKUs ahead of lead time windows

• Track stranded, unsellable, and aged inventory and escalate for action

• Reconcile inventory discrepancies between ShipStation, QuickBooks, and marketplace portals

• Maintain product master data including ASINs, Walmart Item IDs, UPCs, dimensions, and weights

• Assist with IPI score monitoring and FBA storage limit management



CRM & Marketing Operations

• Maintain and update Method CRM: contacts, accounts, activity logs, and pipeline stages

• Build and send
 campaigns in Omnisend per marketing calendar

• Schedule and publish social media content via 
 across
, Instagram, and TikTok

• Pull campaign performance reports (open rates, click rates, conversion data)

• Manage 
 prospect lists: upload, enrich, and sequence contacts

• Respond to Tidio live chat inquiries and escalate when needed

• Assist with content production: resize images, light copy editing, organize Canva assets

• Maintain marketing asset libraries including product photos, logos, and brand files



Administrative & General Operations

• Maintain organized digital filing systems (Google Drive, Dropbox, or equivalent)

• Draft, format, and proofread professional documents, proposals, and reports

• Conduct internet research on competitors, suppliers, pricing, and industry trends

• Manage and renew business subscriptions, licenses, and vendor accounts

• Coordinate with suppliers and vendors on purchase orders, lead times, and quality issues

• Maintain standard operating procedures (SOPs) and update documentation when processes change

• Assist with HR tasks: job postings, candidate screening, interview scheduling

• Handle miscellaneous executive tasks as they arise — this role is dynamic and no two weeks look the same



Tools You Will Work In

Proficiency or fast ramp-up required on:



QuickBooks Desktop - Method CRM - Amazon Seller Central Walmart Seller Central - ShipStation - Omnisend - 
 Loomly -Tidio - Canva - Zapier - Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs) -Microsoft Office (Word, Excel) Zoom / Teams - Slack



What We Are Looking For

Required

• 3+ years of experience as a VA, EA, or online business manager

• Demonstrated experience supporting Amazon FBA/FBM or Walmart Seller Central operations

• Strong written and spoken English — you will communicate directly with U.S. customers, vendors, and partners

• Experience with QuickBooks (Desktop preferred) or equivalent accounting software

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through

• Comfortable managing multiple priorities without needing constant supervision

• Reliable high-speed internet, noise-free workspace, and backup power/internet solution

• Available for daily/weekly video check-ins on U.S. Central time

Preferred

• Experience with Method CRM or any CRM platform

• Background in e-commerce, wholesale distribution, or manufacturing

• Familiarity with Amazon case management, reimbursements, and listing troubleshooting

• Tradeshow or event coordination experience

• QuickBooks Desktop (not Online) experience — this is a meaningful differentiator

• Experience building SOPs and process documentation



What Makes Someone Exceptional Here

The best person for this role is not someone who waits to be told what to do next. They proactively identify what needs attention, communicate clearly when something is off track, and consistently follow through without reminders.



We value:

• Ownership mentality — you treat the business like it matters to you

• Proactive communication — you send the update before we ask for it

• Systems thinking — you look for ways to build repeatable processes, not just do tasks once

• Precision — mistakes in orders, invoices, and customer communications are costly; accuracy matters

• Reliability — showing up on time, every time, is non-negotiable



How to Apply

Submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your cover message, please include:

• A brief summary of your most relevant experience for this specific role

• The tools from our stack above that you have hands-on experience with

• One example of a problem you solved proactively for a previous employer — something they did not ask you to fix but you noticed and addressed

• Your current availability and time zone overlap with U.S. Central time



Applications without a personalized cover message will not be reviewed. We read every submission carefully and will respond to qualified candidates within 3 business days.

title: AI Social Media VA + Client Coordinator (Growth Role)
description:
WAGE/SALARY                                                                                                                                                                                                  

                                                                                                                                                                                                             

  $3-6 hour DOE + performance bonuses

ing our clients to collect logins, photos, videos, testimonials, ad approvals, and anything else our campaigns need to run. You're the person who keeps clients

, Instagram, TikTok captions)

, Meta Business Suite

  - Bonus: prior work with US-based agencies                                                                                                                                                                   

                                                                                                                                                                                                               

  WHAT YOU GET:

  - You grow with the business — not just clock hours                                                                                                                                                        

                                                                                                                                                                                                               

  HOW TO APPLY:                                                                                                                                                                                              

  Send me a short message with:                                                                                                                                                                                

  1. Your favorite AI tool and what you use it for                                                                                                                                                           

  2. A sample social post (1 paragraph) you'd write for a local El Paso indoor cycling studio — just make one up                                                                                             

  3. Your time zone and how many hours/week you can commit                                                                                                                                                     

  4. title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Principal Software Engineer to take a leading role in building a new, design-led digital platform from the ground up. This is a hands-on role with significant influence over the technical direction of the product, working closely with product and design to bring a high-quality user experience to life.



You will be responsible for shaping the core architecture of the platform, making key decisions around data modelling, API design, and system structure. The role spans the full stack, from implementing a clean and scalable backend to delivering a polished, performant frontend that reflects a considered design system.



A key part of the role is building the platform in a way that is robust from day one. This includes integrating marketplace payments, handling real-time interactions, managing user identity and permissions, and ensuring the system is secure, observable, and able to scale as the product grows.



You will also play a leadership role within a small engineering team, setting standards for code quality, guiding technical decisions, and helping less experienced engineers move quickly without compromising the integrity of the build.



Responsibilities

 • Own the overall technical architecture and system design of the platform

 • Design and implement scalable backend systems, APIs, and data models

 • Build and maintain frontend components aligned with a defined design system

 • Lead integration of key third-party services including payments, messaging, and analytics

 • Ensure high standards for code quality, testing, and performance

 • Establish development workflows, environments, and deployment processes

 • Collaborate closely with product and design to translate requirements into working software

 • Support and guide other engineers, providing technical direction and mentorship

 • Identify and manage technical risks early, particularly around scaling and complexity



Experience and Skills

 • 6+ years professional experience in full-stack development, ideally with modern JavaScript frameworks

 • Strong experience building and shipping production-grade web applications

 • Experience designing APIs and working with relational databases

 • Familiarity with cloud-based architectures and modern backend platforms (e.g. Supabase, Firebase, or similar)

 • Experience integrating third-party services such as payments (Stripe), messaging, or search

 • Strong understanding of application security, authentication, and data protection

 • Comfortable working across both frontend and backend with a focus on delivering complete features

 • Ability to balance speed of delivery with long-term maintainability



Nice to have

 • Experience building marketplace or two-sided platforms

 • Experience with Stripe Connect or similar payment systems

 • Familiarity with real-time systems or messaging platforms

 • Experience working in small, fast-moving product teams

 • Interest in design-led or consumer-facing products



To apply, please send the following:

 1. Total Professional Experience

 2. Number of architected production grade applications 

 3. Approximate number of real users or transactions handled in one application

 4. University and GPA

 5. Expected salary in AUD per hour

 6. Location in Philippines

        7.     Link of your PDF CV in a drive, not your website.



This will be a fully remote role in AEST timezone, with possible travel to Australia one in a while.

title: Virtual Assistant (VA)/Excel EXPERT
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, part-time Virtual Assistant who breathes Excel. This role requires an expert in Excel 365 to handle data processing, business intelligence tasks, and complex financial modeling.



Here is what you will do:



Share Valuation & Financial Modeling: Build a Two-Stage Dividend Discount Model (DDM) to forecast short-run and long-run dividend growth. Calculate estimated share prices and compare them using P/E benchmarking.



Financial Data Sourcing: Extract and aggregate historical financial data, including Earnings Per Share (EPS), cash dividends, actual share prices, and Equity Beta from Yahoo Finance, alongside industry forward P/E ratios.



Advanced Finance Formulas: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model (CAPM) using specific risk-free rates and market risk premiums to determine discount rates, and calculate the Present Value (PV) of forecasted dividends and Terminal Value.



Business Intelligence Metrics: Calculate key figures including total spend, gross revenue, VIP customer counts, and dynamically apply discount tiers based on logic rules.



Dynamic Data Functions: Write clean, modern formulas using XLOOKUP, FILTER, LET, and SUMIFS to cross-reference product pricing, VIP status, and transaction line items. Strict rule: No hardcoding and no legacy functions.



Data Quality & Auditing: Set up conditional formatting to highlight missing data (e.g., customer states) and use array logic (such as the -- double unary) to count and manage duplicate transaction numbers and IDs.
