title: CRM & Website Support
description:
I am a small business owner in the insurance industry (health, Medicare, and life insurance) based in the United States. I am looking for an experienced technical specialist to help me manage, complete, and improve my CRM system and business website on an ongoing, as-needed basis.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. I need someone who takes ownership, solves problems at the root level, and communicates clearly — not someone who applies quick fixes and moves on.



 



My CRM is custom-built but not fully completed. I need someone who understands how a CRM should function in a real business — including client tracking, workflows, and integrations with
 and forms.



My website is hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS) and has experienced repeated downtime. I am currently being charged every time the site needs to be restored, and I need someone who can find the root cause, stabilize the system, and prevent this from happening again.



 



- Audit and evaluate my CRM and website systems

- Complete and improve CRM functionality (data tracking, workflows, automation)

- Set up and manage integrations 
 systems, lead forms, website connections)

- Diagnose and permanently fix website downtime and performance issues

- Improve website security and prevent recurring disruptions

- Manage hosting environment, domains, and DNS settings

- Ensure I have full administrative control over all my systems

- Provide clear documentation and recommendations for long-term stability



 



- Proven experience working with CRM systems in a real business environment

- Strong knowledge of integrations 
 platforms, web forms, automation tools)

- Solid backend website experience (WordPress or similar platforms)

- Experience with AWS or similar hosting platforms

- Knowledge of website security, uptime monitoring, and troubleshooting

- Ability to identify and fix root causes — not just temporary workarounds

- Strong English communication and documentation skills

- Reliable, self-directed, and able to work independently



 



- Fully remote

- Flexible hours, as needed

- Ongoing relationship strongly preferred



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please do ALL of the following:



1. Start your application with the word SYSTEM (applications that do not begin with this word will not be reviewed)

2. Describe your experience with CRM systems and integrations

3. Provide specific examples of systems you have built, fixed, or improved

4. State your hourly rate in USD

5. Submit a **2–5 minute video** explaining:

   - How you would audit a CRM and website

   - How you would troubleshoot repeated website downtime on AWS

   - Your experience with integrations and automation



 



  I need someone I can trust with my systems long-term. If you are experienced, dependable, and take pride in doing things right the first time, I would love to hear from you.

title: Script (Steps) Writer + Screen recorder
description:
Our videos for this role will primarily focus on tutorials, reviews, and step-by-step walkthroughs of SaaS software and digital products.



Your responsibility is to first create a clear, structured set of steps for each video. These steps will then be used to guide your screen recording, where you’ll walk through the software in real time, following the exact flow of the steps.



Here’s an example of how the final step-by-step structure should look: 



You’ll need to break down the entire process into individual steps that will be shown in the video. This includes everything, navigation, buttons clicked, inputs entered, prompts used, and any important on-screen actions. Provide any assets that are generated or relevant to the walkthrough (example: if you generate a video as part of the walkthrough, download the video and provide that with any other assets. Make sure they're labelled to the corresponding step). 



Once completed, send the steps using the same format as the example above. We will then convert your steps into a polished final script for you to use during recording. Example script: 



After receiving the final script, record your screen while going through the tool or course, following the script exactly — as if you’re performing a live walkthrough.



Requirements:

- Excellent attention to detail, you must follow steps exactly with no missed actions

- Understanding of engaging video flow (you know how to structure steps so they make sense and keep the viewer engaged)

- Experience with screen recording tutorials or SaaS walkthroughs is a plus

- Fluent in English with clear communication skills

- Create a separate Chrome profile named “AFFContent” for all recordings. This ensures no personal bookmarks, tabs, or browsing history appear in the video.

- Ensure your screen recording is high quality, smooth, clear, and free from lag.

- Move at a natural pace: don’t rush through steps, but also avoid unnecessary delays.

- Most recordings should fall within the 10–20 minute range, depending on the length of the script.

- Follow the script from beginning to end in the correct order. This is essential, as the editor will sync your footage with a voiceover.

- Reliable, consistent, and responsive



We will provide access to any paid tools or gated content required for the task. Please use resources efficiently and avoid unnecessary usage of credits & generations, or features.



In the subject line of your application include the word "Star" to confirm that you read the whole job description. Thank you.

title: Recruitment Expert
description:
# Recruitment Agent Needed — Source High-Quality Video Talent (AI Creators & Editors)



We're looking for a driven recruitment agent to help us find and vet top-tier video talent on an ongoing basis. This is a commission-based role — you earn $100 USD for every successful hire you bring us.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



You'll source, engage, and screen candidates for two types of roles, then send us only the best. We do NOT want to interview low-quality applicants — your job is to be the quality filter.



**Your responsibilities:**

- Find candidates through job boards, communities, freelance platforms, social media, and your own network

- Review their portfolios carefully against the criteria below

- Have a conversation with each candidate to confirm their skills, availability, and interest

- Submit only vetted, high-quality candidates to us with a short summary and portfolio links



---



## Role 1: AI Video Content Creator



We need creators who work with AI video generation tools and produce polished, creative output — not just raw AI dumps.



**Required:**

- Hands-on experience with Seedance, Nano Banana, or similar AI video generation tools

- Familiarity with other AI tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, etc.) is a plus

- Strong prompt engineering skills and ability to refine AI outputs to a high standard

- Good eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual composition



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 completed AI-generated video projects

- Evidence of creative direction (not just default outputs)

- Quality refinement and iteration on AI-generated content



---



## Role 2: Professional Video Editor



We need editors who can deliver polished, professional-grade video across formats.



**Required:**

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or Avid Media Composer

- Solid skills in colour grading, audio mixing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience editing for social media (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) and/or long-form content

- Ability to work from briefs and hit deadlines



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 professionally edited video projects

- Variety of styles or formats (social, commercial, narrative, etc.)

- Clean technique, good pacing, and polished audio/visuals



---



## Compensation



- **$100 USD per successful hire** — no cap on placements

- Paid upon candidate acceptance and confirmation

- Freelance / independent contractor basis

- Ongoing engagement — keep sourcing as long as you're delivering quality



---



## Do NOT Send Us



- Candidates with generic or low-effort demo reels

- Portfolios of unedited, raw AI outputs with no refinement

- Editors whose only experience is with basic tools like iMovie or CapCut

- Anyone who can't demonstrate real, hands-on use of the required tools

- Applicants who can't communicate clearly or follow a brief



---



## To Apply



Tell us:

1. A brief intro about your recruiting experience, especially in creative/video talent

2. Examples of past placements or sourcing work (if available)

3. Your preferred sourcing channels and methods

4. Confirmation you understand the $100/hire commission structure



We're looking for agents who take quality seriously. If that's you, we'd love to work together.

description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Sales Quoting Assistant to support our health insurance sales team. In this role, you will intake data from multiple sources, consolidate it into a cohesive format, and generate accurate plan quotes based on client-specific intake forms. You will collaborate closely with licensed agents, ensuring all quoting materials meet client needs and compliance standards.



This is a remote role requiring strong proficiency in Excel, excellent data handling skills, and the ability to take direction and feedback in a fast-paced, client-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

Data Intake & Consolidation:

- Gather and review client information from multiple files, forms, and formats.

- Consolidate all inputs into a single, organized quote file to support agent presentations.

- Cross-reference and align data according to client eligibility and plan requirements.



Plan Matching & Quoting:

- Interpret client intake forms to determine appropriate health insurance plans based on factors such as age, location, budget, and coverage needs.

- Select plans from approved carriers and create clear, accurate quote documentation.



Excel & Data Entry:

- Use advanced Excel features (e.g., formulas, VLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting) to manage and manipulate data efficiently.

- Accurately enter and format data within predefined templates or quoting tools.



Agent Support & Communication:

- Collaborate with sales agents to clarify client needs, request missing data, and ensure quotes are timely and aligned with expectations.

- Take feedback from agents and make adjustments promptly and accurately.



Compliance & Quality Control:

- Ensure all quotes follow regulatory guidelines and company protocols.

- Review quote files for accuracy, consistency, and completeness before submission.



Qualifications:

- 2+ years of experience in sales support, quoting, or data processing in the health insurance industry (or similar regulated field).

- Advanced Excel proficiency with strong data management and organization skills.

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and file management.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to work independently in a virtual environment with minimal supervision.

- Experience interacting with licensed health insurance agents or brokers is a plus.



Preferred Skills:

- Familiarity with health insurance carriers, plans (ACA, Medicare, etc.), and quoting practices.

- Experience with quoting tools, CRMs, or enrollment platforms (e.g., HealthSherpa, Quote+, Salesforce).

- Understanding of HIPAA guidelines and data handling best practices.

title: Crypto currency OTC manager USDT
description:
## ???? Job Posting: USDT OTC Manager



**Position:** USDT OTC Manager

**Type:** Full-Time

**Location:** Remote / [Your Location]

**Posted:** May
### About the Role



We are seeking an experienced **USDT OTC Manager** to lead our over-the-counter stablecoin trading desk. You will serve as the primary point of contact for high-volume clients, institutional counterparties, and liquidity providers — ensuring smooth, compliant, and competitive USDT transactions at scale. This is a high-trust, high-impact role for someone who understands both the technical and relationship-driven sides of OTC crypto markets.



---



### Key Responsibilities



- Execute and manage large-volume USDT OTC transactions for institutional and high-net-worth clients

- Source and maintain liquidity from counterparties, market makers, and exchange partners

- Build and grow a pipeline of OTC clients through networking, referrals, and proactive outreach

- Negotiate competitive rates and structure deals aligned with risk and profit targets

- Monitor market conditions, track spot price spreads, and manage settlement risk in real time

- Coordinate with compliance and AML teams to ensure all transactions meet regulatory requirements

- Maintain accurate records of trades, P&L, and client activity

- Onboard new clients, oversee KYC/KYB verification, and manage ongoing relationships

- Develop and refine OTC desk SOPs, pricing models, and risk management frameworks



---



### Requirements



- 3+ years of experience in crypto OTC trading, digital asset brokerage, or a similar financial markets role

- Strong understanding of USDT, stablecoin mechanics, and on-chain/off-chain settlement processes

- Existing network of OTC counterparties, institutional clients, or liquidity providers is a strong advantage

- Familiarity with AML, KYC, and compliance requirements in crypto financial services

- Proficiency with trading platforms, OTC portals, and blockchain explorers

- Excellent negotiation, communication, and client relationship management skills

- High integrity, discretion, and ability to handle sensitive financial information

- Ability to work across time zones and respond to client needs in a timely manner



---



### Nice to Have



- Experience with multi-chain USDT settlement (TRC-20, ERC-20, Solana)

- Background in FX, commodities, or traditional finance OTC markets

- Familiarity with custody solutions, cold wallet management, or exchange API integrations

- Multilingual skills (Mandarin, Arabic, or other languages a plus for client coverage)



---



### Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive base salary (commensurate with experience)

- Performance-based commission tied to trading volume

- Remote-friendly, flexible working arrangements

- Salary payable in fiat or crypto

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About The Dream Out Loud Group/Morgan Nelson 



Dream Out Loud is a fast-growing coaching, events, and mastermind business on a mission to help ambitious entrepreneurs build businesses that fund the life they actually want. We run premium programs, live events (including DreamFest, our flagship annual event), and high-touch masterminds for founders who want to scale without burning out.



We move fast, hold a very high bar, and invest heavily in people who want to grow with us. Our audience is entrepreneurs, high performers, and business owners who respond to bold, aspirational, beautifully designed content.



Our Values are: 

1) Impact First

Tagline: "We measure success by lives changed, not tasks completed."

? We do: measure success by client wins, focus on what truly moves the needle, design everything for transformation.

? We don’t: chase vanity metrics, tick tasks for the sake of looking busy, or confuse activity with impact.



2) World Class Standard

Tagline: “Stretch Beyond Average”

? We do: deliver excellence quickly, refine until it’s remarkable, and hold ourselves accountable to elite standards.

? We don’t: settle for “good enough,” let sloppiness slide, or accept mediocrity.



3) The Pursuit Of Mastery

Tagline: “Always a student, never finished.”

? We do: Are always growing as individuals professionally and personally. We learn, test, stretch, and practice until we’re world-class; we assume v1 is wrong and improve it.

? We don’t: protect ego, repeat yesterday’s version of ourselves, or resist feedback.



4) Own the Outcome

Tagline: “No excuses. No blame. Just results.”

? We do: take full responsibility, communicate clearly, and bring solutions not problems.

? We don’t: pass the buck, drop the ball, or hide behind excuses.



5) Truth with Respect & Integrity

Tagline: “Say it straight, say it kind & Leave it behind”

? We do: speak openly, honestly, and respectfully; give direct feedback and close loops fast then move on with the mission.

? We don’t: gossip, sugarcoat, avoid tough conversations, or let issues fester.



6) Good Humans, Great Energy

Tagline: “Bring the vibe, lift the tribe.”

? We do: treat people with respect, bring positive energy, celebrate wins, and keep work joyful and purposeful.

? We don’t: bring negativity, drama, or ego; we don’t let “fun” turn into chaos.



---



The Role



This is not a "post and pray" social media role. We are hiring a **growth-obsessed Social Media Manager** who lives on the platforms, knows what's working before it's mainstream, and treats follower count, watch time, and conversion like a scoreboard.



Your #1 priority, every single day, is making our social channels grow. Accounts being the personal brand of the founder (Morgan Nelson) the podcast IG channel aswell as our upcoming event IG page. 



That means staying ahead of trends, feeding the team a constant pipeline of ideas, working hand in hand with our Creative Director to ship content that pops, and making sure every post goes live on time, on platform, and on brand.



You will own the rhythm of our social presence across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
. If our social is flat, that's on you. If our social is on fire, that's also on you.



---



## What You'll Actually Do (In Order of Priority)



**1. Trend Research & Idea Generation**

- Spend dedicated daily time studying what's trending across IG, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and X

- Track competitor and adjacent founder/coaching brands (Hormozi, Brunson, Codie Sanchez, etc.) and report what's working

- Maintain a live trend board: sounds, formats, hooks, edits, visual styles

- Bring 5+ fresh content ideas to every weekly content meeting, mapped to our offers and audience

- Identify trending audio and formats early so we ride the wave, not catch the tail end



**2. Working With the Creative Director**

- Partner closely with our Creative Director on shoots, edits, and creative direction

- Translate trend insights into clear, actionable briefs the Creative Director and editors can execute

- Give sharp creative feedback on cuts, hooks, captions, thumbnails, and covers

- Flag what's missing in the content pipeline before it becomes a problem



**3. Creation, Scheduling & Publishing**

- Own the full content calendar across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts.

- Create carousels and simple video edit reels in the IG app.

- Schedule and publish all posts on time, with platform-native formatting (no lazy cross-posting)

- Write captions, hooks, hashtags, and on-screen text optimised for each platform

- Manage stories, reels, lives, and any time-sensitive content windows

- Keep a clean, organised content library so nothing gets lost



**4. Growth & Performance**

- Track follower growth, reach, watch time, saves, shares, and conversion every week

- Run small experiments constantly (hook variations, thumbnail tests, posting times)

- Report weekly on what worked, what didn't, and what we're doing about it

- Engage with comments, DMs, and the community to build real audience connection

- Spot opportunities to repurpose winning content across platforms



**5. All Things Social Growth**

- Stay across platform algorithm changes, new features, and beta tools the day they drop

- Test new formats early (lives, broadcast channels, threads, new video lengths)

- Build relationships with creators, accounts, and communities aligned with our audience

- Help shape the social-first content strategy as the brand scales



---



## Non-Negotiables (You Must Have All of These)



- **3+ years of social media management experience** for a brand, founder, or business that actually invested in growth (not personal accounts only)

- **Proven track record of growing accounts.** You can show us numbers: follower growth, watch time, saves, shares, viral posts, and explain how you got there

- **You live on the platforms.** You scroll IG and TikTok daily, not as a chore but because you genuinely love it

- **Sharp eye for trends.** You can spot a sound or format before it peaks and know how to adapt it to a brand voice

- **Strong written English** and the ability to write captions, hooks, and on-screen copy that sound human, punchy, and on-brand

- **Tight execution.** You schedule, publish, and double-check. Nothing slips. Nothing posts late.

- **Designer experience** You know your way around canva very well and can create eye stopping but also simple carousel images and basic design work when needed.

- **You take direction well** and collaborate cleanly with a Creative Director without ego

- **Reliable home setup:** stable internet, professional workstation, quiet place to focus

- **Full-time availability,** overlapping at least 4 hours with Australian Eastern time



---



## Nice to Have (Makes You Stand Out)



- Experience growing accounts in the coaching, events, personal brand, or info-product space

- Light editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or InShot) so you can ship a quick edit without waiting on the editor

- Basic design skills in Canva or Figma for covers, thumbnails, and quote graphics

- Experience running a podcast or YouTube long-form clip strategy

- Familiarity with AI tools (Claude, Opus Clip, Submagic) as accelerators

- Community management experience inside Skool, Circle, or
 Groups



---



## Who You Are



- You're chronically online in the best possible way and proud of it

- You can name the last 5 trends you saw blow up and explain why they worked

- You have opinions about hooks, captions, and thumbnails and can defend them

- You take feedback fast, iterate faster, and never take it personally

- You're obsessed with growth, not vanity metrics

- You want to be part of a team, not just a freelancer hiding behind

- You care about doing work you're proud of, at a high standard, consistently



---



## What You Get From Us



- A founder brand with real budget, real reach, and real pressure to grow

- Direct line to the founder and creative team (no agency layers, no politics)

- Clear briefs, fast feedback, and the ability to see your work go live the same day

- The chance to become the social engine behind one of Australia's fastest-growing founder brands

- Competitive full-time contractor pay (we pay above market for the right person)

- Long-term role with room to grow into a Head of Social position as the team scales



---



## How to Apply



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:

title: NYC Restaurant Lead Researcher ( Lead Generation)
description:
Let's Get Lunch (letsgetlunch.nyc) is a NYC platform that helps office workers find prix-fixe lunch deals at real restaurants. We're populating our directory with restaurants that publicly advertise lunch specials. I'm hiring one researcher for ongoing  work — start with a paid trial of 10 restaurants, then scale to 30–40 hours/week if it goes well.

Rate: $2.10/hour, paid via OnlineJobs EasyPay.

What you'll do, per restaurant:



Research the restaurant on the web (their website, Instagram, Google Maps, Yelp, Resy/OpenTable) and confirm they publicly advertise a lunch special or prix-fixe lunch menu.

Capture structured data into a Google Sheet I'll provide: name, full address, neighborhood, cuisine, lunch special description, price, hours, days available, restaurant bio, owner/manager name, phone,
, website, Instagram, source URL, and date verified.

Select 4 landscape photos from the restaurant's own public sources (website, Resy/OpenTable, Google Business, Yelp, Instagram as last resort) — one entrée, one appetizer, one dessert, one ambience shot. No food blogs, no Yelp user uploads, no stock images, no vertical photos.

Verify each restaurant against its own website AND a Google search for "[restaurant name] lunch special" before marking complete. Aggregator articles can be outdated — primary sources only.

After my approval, upload approved listings to the live site form at letsgetlunch.nyc/list-your-restaurant.



The work has clear structure: Research is geographically scoped (I'll assign a specific NYC neighborhood) and uses a 3-category system (A: has a lunch special, goes live; B: has lunch but no special, kept for later outreach; C: skip). Full brief and rules provided once we start.

Volume target: 1–3 restaurants per hour at part-time hours, with full verification. Quality matters far more than speed. Lifting from "best NYC lunch deals" aggregator articles isn't research and won't pass review.

What you won't do: Make any commitments to restaurants, represent yourself as the owner of the site, scrape platforms with login walls, or make phone calls (this is research-only work).

Hours: Flexible. Research can be done any time that fits your schedule.

Trial: Paid trial of 10 restaurants ($21 at $2.10/hour). If quality is good, ongoing engagement at 30–40 hours/week.

What I value in applicants: Honesty about what you don't know matters more than experience with restaurants specifically. If you've done lead generation, list-building, or web research and you're willing to follow a detailed brief carefully, that's the foundation. Tell me what tools you've used (Apollo, Hunter, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator) and send a work sample if you have one.

Why Work With Me: I believe in transparency, honesty, and professional development. I am looking for someone I can mentor and grow with. You will be a key part of the AGARA expansion into Canada and beyond.

title: Senior Healthcare Nurse Recruiter  (Resume & Experience Required)
description:
Job Title: Nurse Recruiter with Administrative Healthcare Experience



Employer: HomeLogic Healthcare



Job Description:



You must have previous Healthcare Recruitment Experience for recruiting registered nurses.



DO NOT APPPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE 1-2 YEARS EXPERIENCE OR PLAN TO WORK AN ADDITIONAL JOB FROM 9am EST - 4pm EST



HomeLogic Healthcare, a leading pediatric home care agency, is seeking an experienced Nurse Recruiter with strong background in administrative healthcare tasks, particularly in requesting and obtaining medical records and documentation. The ideal candidate will play a crucial role in facilitating communication with healthcare providers, assisting in the recruitment of qualified nurses, and supporting the overall administrative operations of our agency. A Bachelor's degree is required for this position. Due to the nature of this work, we will not consider candidates with another job during the hours of 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM EST.



Key Responsibilities:



Medical Records and Documentation:



Request, obtain, and organize client medical records and documentation from hospitals, medical clinics, and other healthcare providers.

Communicate with healthcare professionals via phone and
 to ensure timely and accurate receipt of necessary records and documentation.

Ensure all records are handled in compliance with HIPAA regulations, maintaining confidentiality at all times.

Nurse Recruitment and Staffing:



Assist in attracting and recruiting qualified nurses for pediatric home care positions.

Screen, interview, and coordinate with prospective nursing candidates to match them with the specific needs of our pediatric clients.

Maintain an active database of nursing candidates and manage their credentials.

Collaborate with the staffing team to ensure that staffing requirements are met promptly and effectively.

Administrative Duties:



General administrative tasks, including organizing, filing, and managing medical records and other related documentation.

Create and manage spreadsheets to track and monitor client information, staffing data, and other important metrics.

Coordinate schedules, appointments, and meetings for internal staff, clients, and healthcare providers.







Required:

A Bachelor's degree is required. (Nursing Preferred)

Previous experience in administrative healthcare settings, especially in requesting and obtaining medical records.

Excellent phone skills and the ability to communicate effectively and professionally with hospitals, medical clinics, and healthcare providers.

Strong organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, etc.) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets).

Preferred:

Nursing experience (or healthcare background) is highly preferred but not required.

Previous experience in healthcare staffing recruitment is a plus.

Experience with social media management and marketing is an asset.

Basic graphic design skills (using tools like Canva or Adobe Suite) are a plus.

Skills and Attributes:



Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in managing sensitive information.

Proactive, self-motivated, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

Ability to adapt and learn quickly in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Strong sense of confidentiality and professionalism when dealing with sensitive client and patient information.



Work Hours and Environment:



Due to the nature of this position, candidates with another job during these hours will not be considered. The role requires access to a computer, reliable internet, and a quiet, dedicated workspace.



Application Process:

To apply, please submit the following:



Resume outlining your relevant experience, particularly in healthcare administration and recruitment.

mbers who want stability and consistency

title: Video Editor - Real Estate
description:
To apply, complete the Google Form linked in this posting.


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc9Pdpe2Jc-GA76eNNDos9S9EDL2B9-zAf_n7R9nafiRn3MKw/viewform?usp=dialog



Applications submitted directly through OnlineJobs.ph will not be reviewed.



ABOUT ALLISON MEDIA CO.



Allison Media Co. is a premium real estate media company serving high-performing agents and developers across Ontario — from Niagara to Toronto. We produce photo, video, aerial, and marketing content that helps properties sell and brands stand out.



We're growing fast. Volume is up. Our standard is high. And we need editors who can keep up.



WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS



This isn't a filler role. We have real estate shoots happening daily and a growing backlog of video content that needs to be edited to a premium standard — fast.



The edit is where the brand lives. Every video we deliver goes to an agent's listing, a developer's launch, or a brand's social presence. Your work directly impacts how our clients are perceived and how our business grows.



We need someone who can jump in, learn the standard quickly, and start cutting clips that are clean, consistent, and on-brand — immediately.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



This is a high-volume, high-standard editing role. You'll be responsible for:



Editing 3–5 real estate video packages per day

Working primarily in Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve

Following AMC's editing style, pacing, and color guidelines

Catching your own errors before files are submitted for review

Organizing and managing your own project files cleanly

Communicating clearly with the lead editor and owner on status and flags

Improving your output quality continuously based on feedback



HOW YOU WIN HERE



You'll know you're succeeding when:



Your edits are consistently clean and require minimal revisions

You're hitting turnaround targets without sacrificing quality

The team trusts your files without needing to double-check everything

Your output is improving week over week

Clients are proud to post what we deliver



REQUIREMENTS



Non-negotiable:



Real estate video editing experience — you must have a portfolio that proves it

Proficiency in Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of pacing, color, and storytelling for property video

Ability to work full-time immediately upon hiring

Reliable internet, computer, and professional editing setup

Strong written English for team communication

High attention to detail — you catch mistakes before anyone else does

Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously without losing quality



WHO THIS IS FOR



You've edited real estate content before and you're good at it

You work fast without getting sloppy

You take feedback seriously and apply it on the next edit, not the one after

You want consistent full-time volume, not sporadic freelance work

You're self-directed — you don't need to be told what to do next

You care about the quality of your work, not just getting files out the door



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



Editors without real estate experience

Anyone who avoids feedback or gets defensive about revisions

People who ship 'good enough' work

Freelancers looking for passive, low-commitment work

Anyone who needs constant direction to stay on task



COMPENSATION



Starting Rate:

$6–$10 CAD per hour, based on experience and portfolio quality



Growth:

Performance-based — not time-based. Strong editors grow fast here.



OUR CORE VALUES



These are operating requirements — not wall art.



Extreme Ownership

We take full responsibility for outcomes. We fix problems before they reach the client, follow through, and don't make excuses.



Flexible Excellence

We adapt to real-world challenges without dropping our standard. Speed matters, but polish is non-negotiable.



Professional Confidence

We show up with calm, capable leadership. We guide the client, lead on-site, and carry ourselves like a part of their brand.



Sincere Accountability

We give and receive feedback with clarity, humility, and care. We call each other higher, not out.



HOW TO APPLY



Submit your application through the Google Form linked in this posting. Direct applications through OnlineJobs.ph will not be reviewed.



Your application must include:



Your best real estate video or demo reel (link required)

A 1–2 minute video introduction: who you are, what you're proud of, and why you're the right fit for AMC



We are not looking for the most experienced editor.

We are looking for the right one.



To apply, complete the Google Form linked in this posting.


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc9Pdpe2Jc-GA76eNNDos9S9EDL2B9-zAf_n7R9nafiRn3MKw/viewform?usp=dialog

You’ll be messaging prospects daily, qualifying leads, and booking calls. This is a process-driven role — patience and consistency matter more than speed. You must have excellent written English with no grammar issues, and prior experience with outreach or appointment setting.



Being coachable is a must.



Pay is $3/hr + 2.5% commission on qualified leads that convert.????????????????

title: Appointment Setter / Sales Associate (Coffee Bike World) — Part-Time to Full-Time (NA Hours)
description:
Company: Coffee Bike World (Vancouver-based, expanding worldwide)

Role Type: Remote — Part-time to start (20–30 hrs/week), potential to scale to Full-time

Work Hours: North America time zones, typically 10:00am–5:00pm across PST/MST/CST/EST (schedule may rotate)



About Us: Coffee Bike World designs and sells fully equipped mobile espresso tricycles and espresso bars used by entrepreneurs and brands worldwide. We’re growing fast and need a proactive, fluent-English caller who can turn warm leads into booked calls—and closed deals.



What You’ll Do: You will call and qualify leads from our global pipeline and follow up via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, and
. You will book qualified appointments on the calendar for the Founder and, when ready, close straightforward deals yourself. You will nurture interested prospects by overcoming objections, sharing information, and maintaining 
ntum until purchase. You will learn the product (with training and scripts provided) to confidently explain features, pricing, and ROI. You will maintain CRM hygiene by logging every touch and updating stages, next steps, and notes. You will provide admin and personal-assistant support as needed, including inbox triage, document preparation, simple research, and scheduling. Optionally, you may take on growth tasks such as light social media management, simple Canva graphics, and basic video edits for reels and shorts.



Required Skills and Experience: You have excellent spoken and written English with a neutral and pleasant accent. You have a phone-first mindset with confidence, courtesy, and strong follow-through. You bring experience in sales, appointment setting, or call centers (B2B or high-ticket B2C preferred). You are organized in a CRM such as GoHighLevel. You are comfortable working North America daytime hours. You have stable internet of at least 25 Mbps, a reliable laptop and headset, and a quiet workspace.



Bonus Skills: You may have social media management experience for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts, short-form video editing and captioning, and basic motion text. You may have graphic design skills in Canva or Figma for simple one-pagers, proposals, or posts. You may be familiar with cold
 tools, LinkedIn outreach, and list clean-up, and have light copywriting skills for follow-ups and landing page tweaks. Experience with WhatsApp Business, Calendly, Notion, and Google Workspace is valuable. 



KPIs You’ll Own: You will be measured on dials and contacts per day and the resulting contact rate, on appointments booked and show-up rate, on pipeline conversion from qualified to closed once ramped, and on CRM completeness and adherence to follow-up SLAs.

title: Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Strong Closer) - U.S. Cleaning Business
description:
Sales-Focused Virtual Assistant (Phone-Based | Cleaning Services)



We are hiring a sales-driven Virtual Assistant who knows how to confidently handle objections, guide conversations, and close deals over the phone.



You will be the first point of contact for warm inbound leads interested in our U.S.-based residential cleaning services. Your primary goal is simple: turn qualified inquiries into booked jobs.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys sales conversations, builds trust quickly, and is comfortable asking for the booking.



Key Responsibilities:

? Answer inbound sales calls and follow up with warm leads as needed

? Confidently explain our services, pricing, and packages

? Handle common objections (pricing, timing, trust) calmly and professionally

? Convert leads into scheduled jobs with consistency

? Update CRM with call notes, outcomes, and follow-ups

? Assist with scheduling confirmations and basic admin support

? Deliver excellent customer service throughout the customer journey



What We’re Looking For:

? Fluent, confident English with a natural phone presence

? Proven phone sales or closing experience (metrics preferred)

? Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based homeowners

? Organized, reliable, and able to work independently

? Experience with home services or cleaning is a plus, not required



Technical Requirements:

? Stable wired internet (minimum 30 Mbps)

? Quiet, professional workspace

? Backup internet/device available



Compensation & Schedule:

? $5.50–$6.50/hr base (depending on experience)

? Performance bonuses tied to booked revenue

? 30–40 hours per week

? Availability during U.S. Central Time business hours



To Apply:

Please submit a short video (1–2 minutes) explaining your experience handling objections and closing sales over the phone. Real examples or results are strongly encouraged.



?? If you do not have phone-based sales experience, please do not apply.

title: UGC Talent Manager Wanted
description:
At Blackboard Agency, we create scroll-stopping, high-performing ads for some of the fastest-growing DTC and ecommerce brands globally.



We’re a small team building something ambitious.

We care about performance, we care about creative, and we care about doing work that actually moves the needle.



Now, we’re looking for a UGC Talent Manager to help us scale.



The Role



You will own everything talent.



From sourcing and outreach to systems, relationships, and performance — this role is end-to-end.



You’ll be building and managing a global network of high-performing UGC creators and influencers across Australia, the UK, the US, and beyond.



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a build, optimise, and scale role.



What You’ll Be Doing



-> Source and recruit top-tier UGC creators globally

-> Manage outreach, negotiations, and ongoing relationships

-> Build and optimise talent pipelines across TikTok, Instagram, etc.

-> Handle whitelisting / partnership ads coordination

-> Manage contracts, usage rights, and deliverables

-> Build internal systems (ClickUp or similar)

-> Develop AI-driven workflows for outreach and tracking

-> Work closely with the creative team to match talent to concepts

-> Continuously improve the quality of talent and systems



What We’re Looking For



-> Highly independent — you take ownership

-> Strong communicator with great people skills

-> Deep understanding of UGC, creators, and paid ads

-> Strong judgement — you know what good talent looks like

-> Organised and systems-focused

-> Comfortable juggling multiple moving parts





Non-Negotiable



-> You must be strong with AI tools (Claude, automations, workflows, etc.)

-> You’re excited to build systems from scratch

-> You’re willing to work hard and push for excellence

-> MUST be Fluent in English (you’ll be client-facing)



The Reality



We’ll be honest.



This role is demanding.

We move fast. We expect a lot. The standards are high.



You need to be a little batshit crazy (in a good way) to thrive here — the kind of person who actually enjoys being deep in the weeds, solving problems, and building something properly.



If you’re looking for something cruisy, this isn’t it.



What You Get



-> Flexible working environment

-> Performance-based bonuses

-> Direct access to the founder and core team

-> Huge growth opportunity as we scale

-> Real ownership over a critical part of the business



How to Apply



Send through:



-> Your resume

-> A short paragraph on why you’re a strong fit — and make it interesting



Subject line: “UGC Talent Manager – Blackboard”



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a Zoom call with the founder, Charles.



Important:

Don’t send a generic application.



Impress us. Show personality. Show how you think.

If you’re the right fit, it’ll be obvious.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Please apply through the below link: 
/careers/43?source=aWQ9MTg=



Compensation: $1,300 – $1,800 / month USD 



Contractual | California business hours | Compensation is based on experience, depth of B2B SEO/content expertise, and demonstrated results. There is strong potential for compensation growth based on performance and impact within the first 3–6 months. 



ABOUT CDMS 



CDMS is a B2B Environmental, Health & Safety (EHS) services company. We work directly with manufacturing and industrial clients, helping them stay compliant, safe, and operationally sound. 



We have strong technical expertise and a clear brand. This role is about turning that expertise into a consistent, credible, and results-driven digital presence. 



THE ROLE 



This is a senior contractual role, not a management position, but one that requires you to operate independently and with sound judgment. You will own our digital marketing output end-to-end: SEO strategy and implementation, content creation, LinkedIn presence, and brand collateral. You will deeply learn our voice, our clients, and our industry, and use that knowledge to build a presence that earns trust in a technical, compliance-driven space. 



You will work closely with our leadership team, who will brief you directly from client conversations and field intelligence. Your job is to transform that raw material into polished, on-brand content that sounds like us: credible, clear, and grounded in real EHS work. 



If you have ever built a B2B content engine from a standing start and you understand what it takes to earn authority in a niche technical industry, this role was written for you. 



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE (3–6 MONTHS) 



Grow LinkedIn presence by 50%–100%, with a focus on relevant, industry-aligned followers 

Increase qualified inbound leads by 30%–70%, supported by consistent content and targeted outreach 

Improve organic website traffic by 20%–40% through SEO optimization and new content 

Establish a consistent, high-quality content cadence across blog, LinkedIn, and newsletters 

Build an initial pipeline of case studies and thought leadership content based on real client work 

Deliver clear monthly reporting with actionable recommendations - not just data 



Note: These targets are supported by timely input from leadership, tool access (Ahrefs, etc.), and shared alignment on priorities. We treat this as a two-way commitment. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO 



SEO 



Conduct and maintain a full SEO audit using Ahrefs; implement and track on-page optimizations 



Perform ongoing keyword research and monitor rankings across target terms 



Identify content gaps and build a topic roadmap based on search demand and competitive analysis 



Own SEO reporting — surface insights to leadership in plain language with clear action items 



Content & Ghostwriting 



Write blog posts, LinkedIn articles, and newsletters in the voice of our leadership team 



Turn client conversations and project outcomes (fed to you by our team) into compelling case studies 



Curate RSS feeds from EHS, manufacturing, and safety industry sources; develop timely, opinionated content based on those topics 



Maintain a consistent editorial calendar across all channels 



Develop and refine our brand voice guide over time — so the standard is documented, not just in your head 



LinkedIn Management 



Manage our leadership team's LinkedIn presence — posting, commenting, and connecting on their behalf 



Engage daily with content from existing clients and prospects in the EHS and manufacturing space 



Grow our LinkedIn network through targeted, strategic outreach 



Track follower growth, engagement rate, and lead signals — report monthly with clear takeaways 



Collateral & Internal Branding 



Apply our existing brand guidelines to materials provided by our technical team — one pagers, site posters, and laminated sheets for client locations 



Coordinate with our onsite admin assistant for printing and lamination, and with the EHS team for client delivery 



Keep all materials current and on-brand 



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR 



4+ years of B2B content marketing or digital marketing experience 



Expert-level SEO with demonstrated ranking results — Ahrefs is your daily driver 



Proven ghostwriting for C-suite or senior executives in B2B industries 



Experience managing full editorial calendars independently, with minimal direction 



Strong track record growing LinkedIn presence for a company or executive 



Excellent written English — you catch errors others miss and you have range 



Canva or basic design skills to adapt brand templates 



Proficient in WordPress or equivalent CMS 



Comfortable with AI writing tools to accelerate output — without sacrificing voice or accuracy 



Self-directed: you manage your own priorities and deadlines without hand-holding 



NICE TO HAVE 



Familiarity with EHS, safety, manufacturing, or industrial compliance industries 



Experience with newsletter platforms (ActiveCampaign or similar) 



Background in managing or mentoring junior content contributors 



WORK SETUP 



Engagement Type: Independent Contractor 



Schedule: California business hours (PST/PDT) 



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred 



Equipment: You provide your own setup; stable internet required 



Tools: Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva, LinkedIn — we provide access on hire 



Next Step: To move forward in the hiring process, please complete the assessment below. Once finished, you’ll receive a second assessment. Completion of both is required for consideration. 
/bo/2SKX/DigitalMarketingSpecialist2026

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Description: Project Manager, Outbound Calling Team



Position Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented Project Manager to oversee an outbound calling team responsible for booking demos for client campaigns. This role is responsible for managing daily team execution, tracking performance data, ensuring KPI and script compliance, maintaining accurate HubSpot reporting, and supporting weekly client communication.

The ideal candidate is organized, data-driven, comfortable managing sales activity, and able to identify performance issues quickly while keeping the account manager and client informed.



Key Responsibilities

- Daily Team Management

- Oversee the outbound calling team’s daily execution.

- Ensure reps complete required calls,
s, and follow-up activities.

- Monitor daily talk time, activity levels, conversations, and demos booked.

- Identify blockers that may prevent the team from hitting campaign goals.

- Hold reps accountable to daily expectations and client requirements.

- KPI and Script Compliance

- Ensure reps are following the approved calling script and campaign messaging.

- Monitor performance against daily and weekly KPIs.

- Review call quality, talk tracks, and outreach consistency.

- Coach or escalate when reps are off-script or below performance expectations.

- Confirm the team is aligned with the client’s ICP, offer, and demo-booking goals.

- HubSpot Reporting

- Ensure all calls,
s, notes, outcomes, and booked demos are logged accurately in HubSpot.

- Review HubSpot daily for missing or inaccurate activity.

- Confirm contacts, companies, meetings, and deals are updated correctly.

- Maintain HubSpot as the source of truth for client reporting.

- Tool Management and Optimization

- Review the outbound calling tool daily to monitor call volume, dispositions, connection rates, and rep activity.

- Identify any technical, workflow, or data issues impacting performance.

- Review and optimize Lemlist campaigns daily, including
s, replies, bounces, deliverability, and sequence performance.

- Recommend improvements to messaging, list quality, timing, and campaign execution.

- Client Reporting and Communication

- Prepare weekly client performance reports.

- Summarize key metrics, wins, issues, risks, and next steps.

- Participate in or support weekly client check-ins.

- Communicate client issues, campaign successes, and performance trends to the account manager.

- Ensure the account manager has the information needed to manage the client relationship effectively.



Qualifications

- Experience managing outbound sales, SDR, BDR, or appointment-setting teams.

- Familiarity with HubSpot or similar CRM platforms.

- Experience with outbound sales tools, calling platforms, and
 sequencing tools such as Lemlist.

- Strong understanding of sales KPIs, including calls,
s, talk time, conversations, and meetings booked.

- Ability to review data and identify performance gaps.

- Strong organizational and communication skills.

- Comfortable holding reps accountable to process, activity, and script compliance.

- Ability to manage multiple moving parts in a fast-paced client environment.



Success Metrics

Success in this role will be measured by:

- Daily calling team activity completion.

- KPI and script compliance.

- Accurate and complete HubSpot reporting.

- Consistent review and optimization of outbound tools and Lemlist.

- Weekly client reporting delivered on time.

- Clear communication of campaign issues and successes to the account manager.

- Improvement in demo-booking performance over time.



Ideal Candidate

- The ideal candidate is highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing both people and data. They understand outbound sales execution, know how to inspect CRM and calling activity, and can keep a team focused on booking qualified demos for clients.



IMPORTANT



All candidates must include:

- CV/Resume 

- Video Introduction of yourself, your experience, and why you are the best fit for the role.

- Internet Speed Test



*Candidates that don't supply these things will not be considered for the role.

title: Rockstar Real Estate Wholesaling Virtual Assistant / Cold Caller
description:
We are looking for a reliable, hungry, and organized Virtual Assistant / Cold Caller to join our real estate wholesaling business.



This role is for someone fast and efficient who understands the USA real estate wholesaling business, knows how to speak with motivated sellers, run comparables, and is comfortable working inside Go High Level CRM and creating automations/workflows



You will be helping with seller outreach, follow-ups, CRM updates, lead management, and daily communication with our team.



This is not just a dialing job. We are looking for someone who can think, ask good questions, stay organized, and help us move leads from cold conversations to warm opportunities.



1. Strong Follow-Up System



Most deals do not close on the first call. The VA should know how to follow up without sounding pushy.



They should be able to:



Call back warm leads

Send short text follow-ups

Track next follow-up dates

Keep notes on seller objections

Revive old leads inside the CRM



A good cold caller does not just “make calls.” They create a follow-up machine.



2. Lead Qualification and Seller Motivation



The VA should understand that not every seller is a deal.



They must be able to identify:



Why the seller may want to sell

How soon they want to sell

What problem they are trying to solve

Whether the property needs repairs

Whether there are taxes, liens, vacancy, probate, tenants, divorce, foreclosure, or other issues

Whether the seller’s price is realistic



This helps protect your time and keeps you focused on the right opportunities.



3. CRM Discipline and Daily Reporting



A cold caller can be friendly, but if the CRM is messy, the business becomes messy.



The assistant should update every lead properly:



Correct pipeline stage

Clear call notes

Proper tags

Follow-up date

Seller motivation

Asking price

Property condition

Call outcome

Next action



They should also send a simple daily report showing:



Number of calls made

Number of conversations

Number of warm leads

Number of appointments booked

Top seller objections

Leads needing our review



You must have experience with:



Real estate wholesaling in the USA market

Cold calling motivated sellers

Go High Level CRM

Lead follow-up and pipeline management

Speaking clearly and professionally with homeowners

Take detailed notes inside CRM

Asking qualifying questions about property condition, motivation, timeline, and asking price



You Must not: 



Be working for another company during the hours you are hired with us

title: IT & Systems Administrator
description:
Apply through the following link: 



About the Company

We are a California-based company operating in the environmental health and safety (EHS) industry. With over 35 years in business, we are a stable, established organization that values consistency, clear processes, and the people who keep things running well behind the scenes.





Schedule Note

This role follows California business hours (PST/PDT), which means your shift will be approximately 1:00 AM – 10:00 AM Philippine time (shifting to 2:00 AM – 11:00 AM during daylight saving). Weekends are always off. The schedule is fixed and predictable — no rotating shifts, no surprise overtime.

We're upfront about this because it's a real consideration. If you've worked a graveyard shift before and found it suits your lifestyle, this role offers the stability and long-term security that makes it worthwhile.





About the Role

We're looking for a careful, methodical tech generalist to own our digital operations day-to-day. This is a stable, long-term role with a clear scope — not a chaotic environment where priorities change hourly.

You'll manage the platforms our team relies on, build automations that actually last, document everything you learn, and troubleshoot issues with patience and precision. Most work is independent; you'll have a senior tech lead to collaborate with on bigger initiatives but won't need constant supervision.





What You'll Own

•    Systems & Platforms — Become the resident expert on our core tools: Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate), WordPress, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, FileMaker, and Dialpad. Handle configurations, updates, and improvements with attention to detail.

•    Automation — Identify repetitive processes and build reliable, well-documented automations that the team will actually use long-term.

•    Documentation — Write SOPs, troubleshooting guides, and process docs. Record training videos. Build the knowledge base that keeps operations consistent.

•    Tech Support & Troubleshooting — Diagnose real problems at the root level — not just surface symptoms — and guide teammates to lasting solutions via chat, call, or screen share.

•    Infrastructure & Systems Management — Maintain and monitor the underlying systems, networks, and environments that keep operations running reliably.

•    Security & Access — Manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords. Keep systems organized before issues arise.







What We're Looking For

•    You learn tools deeply — real expertise, not surface familiarity

•    Documentation comes naturally to you; it's how you ensure quality

•    You work well independently with a defined scope and clear direction

•    You're methodical: you'd rather fully understand a problem than rush a fix

•    You troubleshoot systematically — you trace problems to their root cause, not just the surface symptom

•    You have hands-on experience with tech infrastructure — networks, systems, user environments, or cloud-based setups

•    Stable, predictable work — even at odd hours — suits you better than daytime chaos



Why This Role Stands Out

•    Fixed schedule — same hours every day, no rotating shifts

•    Weekends always off — no exceptions

•    Long-term stability — permanent role, not project-based

•    160 hours/month — full-time, consistent workload

•    Deep ownership — you'll go deep on our systems, not bounce between tasks

•    Calm environment — established team, defined processes, no daily fire drills







Benefits

•    Paid leaves — we provide paid time off so you can rest and recharge without worrying about lost income

•    Paid California public holidays — you will be paid on all California public holidays

•    Stable, long-term engagement — this is not a project-based or contractual role; we're looking for someone to grow with us







Minimum Requirements

•    Bachelor's degree in any field (4-year course), preferably IT, Computer Science, or a related discipline

•    At least 2 years of experience in tech support, IT administration, or infrastructure management

•    Proven troubleshooting experience — hardware, software, network, or systems level

•    Solid Microsoft 365 experience (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate)

•    Ability to work California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)





Bonus Points

•    Experience with HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, WordPress, FileMaker, or Dialpad

•    Background in network administration, cloud infrastructure, or endpoint management

•    Experience with process documentation or SOP writing

•    Prior experience in a remote, US-based work setup







How to Apply

Submit a cover letter (300–500 words) addressing the following:

1.    Describe a tech infrastructure or systems problem you troubleshot — what was the issue, how did you diagnose it, and what was the outcome

2.    Walk us through a platform or system you managed and maintained — what tools were involved and how did you ensure it ran reliably

3.    Share an example where your documentation or SOPs made a real difference to a team or process

4.    Describe how you have handled security and access management — how do you manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords, and what does your workflow look like when onboarding or offboarding a user

5.    Walk us through how you approach tech infrastructure — how do you monitor, maintain, and flag issues before they become problems

6.    Why this role appeals to you, and confirm whether you are comfortable working California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)



Attach your resume along with your cover letter. We review both, but we're more interested in how you think and work than in job titles.

title: Recruiting & HR Virtual Assistant — Hiring Lead / Executive Assistant
description:
Clean Buddies is a fast-growing, family-owned post-construction cleaning company based in Phoenix, Arizona. We are the post-construction crew that builders, contractors, and luxury homeowners call when a job needs to be turned over move-in ready. We've cleaned 5M+ square feet, run 6 days a week, and we are scaling our team — which is where you come in.



We are hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to be the hiring engine and right hand to our leadership. This is NOT a "do a little of everything" task VA role. Recruiting and hiring is the core of the job. If you love the work of finding great people, running interviews, and building a team — keep reading.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN (60–70% of the role):

RECRUITING & HIRING

- Source candidates on OnlineJobs.ph, Indeed, LinkedIn, and other platforms

- Write and post job ads for cleaners, office staff, and other roles

- Review applications and resumes; screen out unqualified candidates

- Send outreach messages and
s to passive candidates

- Schedule interviews and manage the candidate calendar

- Run first-round phone/Zoom interviews using our scripts

- Reference checks, background check coordination, and onboarding paperwork

- Keep our applicant tracking spreadsheet/system clean and up to date

- Build pipelines so we always have qualified candidates ready



WHAT ELSE YOU'LL HANDLE (30–40% of the role):

HR & ADMIN

- Employee onboarding and offboarding

- Maintain HR records, employee files, and basic compliance docs

- Help draft policies, SOPs, and training materials

- Track time-off requests and basic HR coordination

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / ADMIN

- Calendar and inbox management for the owner

- Data entry, document organization, and follow-ups

- Light vendor and customer communication when needed

- Other admin projects as they come up



WHO YOU ARE:

- 1+ years of recruiting, HR, or talent acquisition experience (running interviews, not just scheduling)

- Excellent written and spoken English (C1/C2)

- Confident on the phone and on Zoom — you'll be talking to candidates

- Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and follow-through is your default

- Comfortable working independently with weekly check-ins

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, working webcam and headset

- Long-term mindset — we want someone who grows with us



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience hiring for US-based companies

- Experience hiring blue-collar / field service roles (cleaners, technicians, drivers)

- Familiarity with Google Workspace, Slack, and basic spreadsheets

- Experience with applicant tracking systems or HR software



SCHEDULE:

- Full-time, ~40 hours/week

- Monday–Friday with some overlap with US Mountain Time business hours (we'll work out a schedule that's reasonable for you)



COMPENSATION:

- $3–$9/hour USD depending on experience

- Paid time off and holidays after probation

- Performance raises — we reward people who do great work

- Long-term role with real growth as we expand



TO APPLY:

Please reply with:

1. The subject line "I'm Your Clean Buddies Recruiter — [Your Name]"

2. A short paragraph on the most challenging hiring/recruiting project you've worked on and what made it hard

3. How many candidates you've personally interviewed (rough number is fine)

4. Your expected hourly rate

5. A 1–2 minute Loom or video introduction (optional but strongly preferred)



Applications without the subject line will be skipped — it's our first filter for attention to detail.



We're excited to meet you.

— The Clean Buddies Team

title: Urgent: Product Research & Sourcing Expert (Remote)
description:
At Orca Brands, we specialize in creating high-performance beauty and wellness tools designed to make a real impact. From advanced skincare to haircare technology, our products are backed by science and built for results. Sold both direct-to-consumer and via Amazon, our brand is trusted by women worldwide. As we continue to grow, we're looking for a strategic Product Research & Sourcing Expert with a marketing mindset to help us scale and innovate faster.



Job Summary

We’re seeking a Product Research & Sourcing Expert who is not only experienced in supplier and manufacturing coordination, but also has a strong grasp of brand positioning, consumer trends, and marketing strategy. In this role, you’ll work closely with cross-functional teams to source products and packaging that align with our Unique Selling Propositions (USPs) and meet evolving market demands.



Primary Duties and Responsibilities:

Product & R&D Timeline Management: Maintain an always-updated product development snapshot to monitor manufacturing status and proactively avoid delays.

Pretotyping & Trend Scouting: Collaborate with factories to explore new product categories and innovations that support product-market fit and deliver fresh USPs.

Quality Control Coordination: Ensure quality standards are met and sustained through consistent communication with suppliers and product testing.

Sourcing & Procurement: Identify and vet new suppliers, source competitive quotes, negotiate MOQ, pricing, and lead times.

Packaging & Brand Alignment: Source packaging that enhances brand perception and strengthens product USPs through aesthetics and functionality.

Spec Sheet & Tech Pack Oversight: Work with factories to maintain up-to-date product documentation, including part numbers, materials, and contract terms.

Cost Optimization: Track and manage per-part pricing and production efficiency without compromising quality or brand positioning.

Collaborate with Marketing: Work with product and marketing teams to ensure sourced products clearly communicate their value proposition and unique benefits.



Qualifications:

2–5 years experience in sourcing, preferably in beauty, wellness, or consumer electronics

Familiar with Chinese and Asian suppliers, Alibaba, 1688, and related platforms

Marketing background or strong understanding of product positioning and USP development

Experience working with DTC brands or Amazon sellers is a strong plus

Strong written and spoken English; Mandarin is a bonus

High attention to detail; process-driven and self-managed

Excellent communication, negotiation, and supplier relationship skills

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment



What We Offer:

Competitive salary – earn in USD

Health coverage (HMO) – after one year

Paid time off – we believe in work-life balance

Global exposure – work with a diverse and innovative team



Explore Our Brands

title: Jr. Account Executive | Remote | U.S. Mortgage Company
description:
Job Type: Full-Time | Remote

Experience Level: Entry-Level (with or without experience)

Base pay of Php 19,715.00 – Php 28,600.00 + monthly performance-based incentives



We are a growing U.S.-based mortgage company looking for a Jr. Account Executive to join our team. This role is not just administrative. You will be responsible for supporting loan operations while also helping drive business growth through outbound calling, lead generation, and relationship building with broker partners.



This position is ideal for fresh graduates or early-career professionals who are confident communicators, proactive, and comfortable speaking with people, following up consistently, and building long-term professional relationships.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct outbound cold calls to prospective and existing broker partners

Perform lead generation and outreach to grow our broker network

Build and maintain strong relationships with external broker partners

Follow up consistently with brokers to drive submissions and loan volume

Assist brokers and loan processors in collecting, reviewing, and organizing borrower documents

Coordinate with brokers, processors, and internal teams throughout the loan process

Follow up on missing documents, conditions, and outstanding requirements

Upload and manage files in the loan origination system

Ensure all documents are complete, accurate, and properly labeled

Maintain file notes, status updates, and internal records

Communicate updates between underwriting, processing, sales teams, and broker partners

Help keep loan files on track to meet turnaround timelines



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, or related field is a plus but not required

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Comfortable with cold calling and outbound communication

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Proactive, reliable, and results-driven

Basic knowledge of Google Workspace or Microsoft Office

Willingness to learn U.S. mortgage processes (training will be provided)



Specific Requirements



Reliable high-speed internet connection

Backup internet or data plan (mobile hotspot or secondary ISP)

Quiet and professional work environment

Willingness to work full-time during U.S. business hours (PST), equivalent to 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time



Nice to Have



Experience in BPO, sales, lead generation, or customer service

Experience in cold calling or outbound sales

Familiarity with U.S. mortgage terms and loan process

Experience working with brokers or in relationship-based roles



Why join us?



Base pay of Php 19,715 – Php 28,600 with salary progression plus performance-based incentives

Opportunity to grow into a sales or Account Executive role

Paid training and continuous support provided

Supportive and collaborative team environment

Long-term remote role with career growth potential

Exposure to real-world U.S. mortgage operations and business development



How to Apply



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and follow the instructions below carefully.



Submit your updated resume in PDF format or as a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or OLJ profile)

If submitting a link, make sure it is set to “Anyone with the link can view”

Include your relevant experience (Mortgage, Sales, BPO, Admin, or Customer Service)

Include your expected monthly salary in PHP

Include your earliest start date or availability



Please also answer the following questions in your application:



Are you aware that the working schedule is 11:30 PM to 8:30 AM Philippine time, and are you able to work consistently during these hours?

Are you comfortable making outbound calls during this schedule?

Do you have a quiet and dedicated workspace suitable for calls?

What experience do you have with cold calling or outbound sales? Please briefly describe your role and results.



Important



Start your application with this exact line: “I have read the job post from beginning to end.”



Shortlisted Candidates



Will be asked to submit a speedtest (at least 100 MBPS required; screenshot from speedtest.net)

Will provide computer specifications (16 GB RAM and processor)

Will answer short scenario-based questions



Note



Only applicants who follow the instructions above will be prioritized for review



We are looking for reliable and motivated individuals who are serious about building a long-term career in both mortgage operations and business development. If that sounds like you, apply now. We review applications daily.

title: Customer Service Representative (Ecommerce Brand)
description:
Customer Support Representative (DTC E-Commerce)



We’re a fast-growing DTC eCommerce brand looking for a sharp, reliable Customer Support Rep to manage day-to-day support and keep our customers happy.



You’ll be handling support tickets primarily through Gmail, resolving issues quickly and professionally across areas like refunds, subscription cancellations, and order tracking. This role requires someone who can think on their feet, communicate clearly, and take full ownership of customer issues from start to finish.



What we’re looking for:



Prior experience in customer support for a DTC eCommerce brand

Strong experience handling support tickets via Gmail or similar platforms

Comfortable processing refunds and managing orders directly in Shopify

Familiar with order tracking tools (e.g., Parcel Panel)

Experience coordinating with suppliers and 3PLs for order updates and issue resolution

Clear, professional communication — able to stay calm and solution-focused under pressure



What you’ll do:



Respond to customer inquiries quickly and accurately

Handle refunds, subscription cancellations, and order tracking requests

Investigate and resolve shipping issues with suppliers and 3PL partners

Ensure every customer interaction is clear, helpful, and builds trust



We’re looking for someone who moves fast, pays attention to detail, and takes pride in delivering a great customer experience.

title: Guest Communications Co-Host (Experienced Only | On-Demand + Weekend On-Call)
description:
Guest Communications Co-Host (Experienced Only | On-Demand + Weekend On-Call)



Company: Vivid Vacation Rentals

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Part-Time / On-Demand (Max 10 hrs/week)



Who This Is For



This role is for a seasoned Airbnb Co-Host or hospitality professional.



You already know how to:



Communicate clearly and professionally with guests

Manage multiple conversations in real time

Respond quickly and accurately without delays



If you do not have direct Airbnb or hospitality experience, this role is not a fit.



Role Overview



You will own guest communication and experience across our U.S.-based vacation rental portfolio.



This is an on-demand role, not a fixed shift.



Work is based on:



Daily arrivals and departures

Guest communication flow

Being available and highly responsive during key windows and on-call periods

How the Role Works

Daily Execution (Typically 1–2 Hours)

Review arrivals and departures

Send required guest messages

Respond to active conversations

Peak Communication Windows (U.S. Mountain Time – Critical)



You must be highly responsive during:



6:00 AM – 10:00 AM

4:00 PM – 7:00 PM (check-in window)

Weekend After-Hours On-Call (Required)

Friday, Saturday, Sunday (U.S. time)

On-call for:

6:01 PM – 9:59 AM (Mountain Time)



You are not expected to work continuously—but must be available and responsive.



Response Standard (Non-Negotiable)



All guest messages must receive a complete and accurate response within 5 minutes of receipt.



Not 6 minutes

Not 5 minutes + delay

Not a placeholder or acknowledgment



The guest must receive a real answer within 5 minutes.



If escalation is required, it must happen immediately with a clear and confident response.



Core Responsibilities

1. Guest Communication (Primary)

Manage messaging across:

Airbnb

VRBO

 and messaging platforms

Handle:

Booking inquiries

Reservation questions

Pre-arrival and in-stay communication

Guest issues and coordination

2. Proactive Guest Experience



Send personalized messages (not automated):



2 Days After Check-In

Day Before Departure

3. Arrival Coordination

Send check-in instructions and access details

Support guests during arrival window

4. Issue Triage & Escalation

Respond immediately to guest issues

Escalate appropriately when needed

Boundaries (Phase 1)

No payment processing

No refunds or financial decisions

No pricing or rate management

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Airbnb Co-Host or hospitality experience

Strong written English

Fast response capability

High attention to detail

Comfortable with on-demand and on-call work

Equipment & Internet Requirements (Strict)

Laptop (required)

Smartphone (required)

Minimum 50 Mbps down / 20 Mbps up

Backup internet required



Provide:



Speed test screenshot via Speedtest by Ookla

Short screen recording

Compensation

Base Salary: $250 – $300/month

Performance Bonus: $100 – $150/month

Pay Schedule

Paid bi-weekly (every two weeks)

Base salary is split across pay periods

Performance bonus is evaluated and paid each pay period, if earned

Performance & Bonus Structure

Base covers availability and execution

Bonus requires 100% compliance, including:

All messages responded to within 5 minutes

Zero missed messages

Accurate, complete responses



Any missed message or delayed response results in:

???? Loss of bonus for that pay period



Repeated performance issues will result in removal from the role.



Growth Opportunity

Increased hours during peak seasons

Expanded responsibilities based on performance

How to Apply



Include:



Your Airbnb/hospitality experience

Sample response to:

Guest can’t find property at 5:30 PM

Speed test + recording

Confirmation you:

Meet 5-minute response standard

Can work on-demand + on-call



Start your application with: “VIVID”



Final Note



We are not hiring general VAs.



We are hiring someone who:



Moves fast

Communicates clearly

Takes ownership



If you cannot consistently respond within 5 minutes with real answers, this role is not a fit.
