title: FT USA Career Supporting Our Realtor Customers: Proof/Edit Flyers, Phone/Email support. 13th Mo. & Insurance
description:
APPLICATION DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT FRIDAY MAY 8, 2026 (USA CALIFORNIA TIME)

=== IF INTERESTED, PLEASE READ THIS ENTIRE JOB POST FOR INSTRUCTIONS - GENERIC NOTES ARE REPORTED AS SPAM ===



Are you an experienced remote worker with strong spoken AND written business English, ready to communicate directly with USA real estate agents by
 and phone?



Do you have prior experience speaking with US clients on the phone, and writing succinct and professional customer support
s?



Want a Full Time shift with real career growth at a SILICON VALLEY company, with training and promotions to higher-paid work?



This is NOT a data-entry-only role. We are looking for one or two VAs ready to handle a FULL RANGE of USA customer support — proofreading and editing real estate marketing flyers, composing
s to answer realtor questions, making and answering phone calls with realtors, and working in our CRM. Strong candidates will grow into senior support roles quickly.



=== WHAT OUR 5+ YEARS FILIPINO VAS SAY ABOUT US ===



"This company understands the importance of work-life balance and that is what they've given me since I started working with them. They value and care about their employees. My manager consistently checks if my work hours are working for my situation and always grants me time off for quite a few personal affairs. They also make sure I get paid on time."



"Communication is key and they are very open and easy to communicate with. They treat you as partners. They are also very hands on when it comes to training. Their systematic ladder of promotion in terms of tasks and responsibilities made it easy for me to adjust and advance faster. This is a company where your feedback is also valued. I have only been working for them for 10 months but have received 3 raises already. I see myself working and growing here for many more years to come."



A small example of our values: last year we surprised all our PH VAs with a modest but unexpected 8,800 peso bonus before Undas simply because we value family gatherings and remembrance. 





=== ABOUT PAY, HOURS, BENEFITS ===



START PAY: $5 USD per hour (or higher depending on experience and ability). Candidates with demonstrated strong USA real estate customer support experience (phone +
) can soon earn meaningfully more.



For full-time 40 hours/week, that's $865/month, PLUS these benefits:



* EXTRA $60/month insurance reimbursement after first 3 month probation (we don't ask for receipts or proof of insurance)

* PAID 13th Month in early December (a full extra month's pay each year)

* TIME OFF for all PH holidays 

* PAID regular holidays after first 6 months

* PAID BREAKS: After your first 3 month probation you get a 1 hour paid break per shift. Taking at least 1 hour of break per full shift is required, you can split it up however you like (most VAs do something like 3 breaks of 15 + 30 + 15 minutes). Taking longer or more breaks (enjoy dinner with your family) is never a problem if you work out coverage with other on-duty staff. 



VAs who excel earn meaningful raises every 3-6 months during their first year. Our path from starting pay to senior support pay is real and well-traveled by our current team.



We pay EVERY two weeks, on-time, without fail. We use Wise (formerly TransferWise) and WE PAY their currency conversion fees.



FULL TIME 40 hours/week



SHIFT START TIMES (USA CALIFORNIA TIME): all shifts start 7am, 7:30am, OR 8am. We support USA real estate agents during their business hours.



REQUIRED WORK DAYS: Thursday and Friday 8 hours shifts are required (our busiest days). You pick the other days you prefer for your 40 hours per week.



WEEKEND SHIFTS ARE 100% OPTIONAL: One thing our USA realtors love about us is our weekend customer support. So VAs who include a half-day or full-day Saturday and/or a half-day Sunday shift in their preferences receive some preferential hiring consideration.



NICE SPLIT-SHIFT FLEXIBILITY: Many of our VAs are parents/spouses with mid-shift family obligations. We're flexible about splitting shifts — for example, working 7am-12pm + 2pm-6pm California time instead of a continuous 7am-4pm. We let our VA team work out the specific schedules among themselves; our only requirement is that we have at least one VA covering each part of the full 7am-5pm California period. Tell us in your application if you'd appreciate split-shift flexibility and what hours would work best for you, and we'll work it out with you and the team.





=== WHAT YOU WILL ACTUALLY DO ===



* MOSTLY
 & CRM, SOME PHONE. We mostly rely on
 to support our USA realtor customers, but VAs do take or make several phone calls per day with customers to confirm details or resolve order issues. VAs typically spend about 45-60 minutes on the phone per shift, so a phone-friendly work setup is essential.



* Proofread and edit real estate flyers (ads realtors want us to publish) against dozens of guidelines — for example: descriptive titles, has both interior AND exterior photos, property details match online info, proper formatting. Part of the job is learning when an exception to a guideline is appropriate and when it is not - and learning to ASK a manager when you are unsure... for example a first-time customer might get a little extra leeway in some areas. This is judgment work, not just checking boxes.



* Compose short, clear
s answering specific agent questions. Often the trick is figuring out what the agent is ACTUALLY asking. For example, an agent might write "how do I upload my video?" when what they really need is help adding a virtual tour link to their flyer. You need to decipher the real question before you answer.



* Work in our CRM to communicate with customers and keep contact and order data up to date.



* Conduct web research to double-check property details.



* Communicate constantly with your team via our internal chat system. Our team relies heavily on real-time chat to ensure seamless support for our busy realtor customers. That means logging issues, questions, and updates as they happen so the next VA on shift can pick up where you left off.





=== JOB REQUIREMENTS ===



* FLUENT spoken English from the perspective of a USA real estate agent. Clear pronunciation, natural conversational rhythm, no heavy accent that requires the agent to ask you to repeat.



* FLUENT written English that is succinct and professional. You can compose business
s WITHOUT common errors such as "kindly revert back," "discuss about," "regarding to," "for your perusal," wrong verb tense, or template-style phrasing. Your writing should sound like a sharp, professional American assistant wrote it. Concise and direct.



* JUDGMENT. Many of our proofing guidelines have legitimate exceptions for different situations. We need someone who can think, not just match patterns.



* TEAM COMMUNICATION. We need good communicators who understand the importance of keeping team chat/notes up-to-date about issues and questions in real time.



* Prior phone experience with USA customers, clients, or professionals (not just BPO script-reading). Tell us how many years and what kind of customers.



* Some USA real estate familiarity is strongly preferred — you should know terms like MLS, escrow, listing agent, buyer's agent, pending, contingent, CMA, open house, virtual tour. We will train on our specific systems.



* Composure with stressed or blunt customers. Most of our customers are upbeat and relaxed, but real estate agents work on commission and sometimes call when a deal is on the line. If they are brusque once in a while you don't take it personally; you solve the problem.



* CRM experience preferred (we built our own, but let us know what you're familiar with).



If offered a position, you will be an independent contractor and we will need a signed W-8BEN and a copy of your government ID before you start work.





=== YOUR TECHNOLOGY & ENVIRONMENT ===



* Reliable at-home internet (wired preferred) and a computer suitable for full-time professional work

* QUIET workspace suitable for taking and making phone calls during USA business hours — no roosters, traffic, dogs barking, family noise, or construction audible on calls

* Good quality headset with clear microphone

* Backup power and/or backup internet is a plus, given how often storms knock out service in the PH



If your home environment is not good for business phone calls, this is not the right role for you.



== VERY IMPORTANT - HOW TO APPLY - WE DISCARD APPLICATIONS THAT IGNORE THIS SECTION ==



1. SPEAKPIPE VOICE MESSAGE — record a voice message up to 2 or 3 minutes at our voice inbox at:

   



   In the Speakpipe NAME field, type: JOB2605A FIRSTNAME LASTNAME (same format as your
 subject line, below). Voi
s without "JOB2605A" in the name field are deleted unheard.



   In your voice message: 



   (a) State your full name clearly at the start so we can match your voi
 to your
 application. 



   (b) Then answer two quick questions: "Tell me about a time a customer was upset on the phone or in writing, and what you did about it" AND "What did you like best and least about a current or recent job?"



   Just talk normally, it's not a rehearsed sales pitch.



2. In your
 to us, describe your most recent work experience in detail. Please tell me about the actual work you did, NOT just a list of skills. INCLUDE YOUR COMPENSATION HISTORY FOR EACH JOB THE PAST 3 YEARS: HOURS/WEEK AND USD $/HOUR.



3. In your
 to us, tell us specifically: (a) How many years you have spoken with USA customers/clients on the phone, and what kind of conversations. (b) Your USA real estate experience (or "none" if none). (c) Which CRMs you have used.



4. In your
 to us, state your current shift preferences in CALIFORNIA TIMEZONE: (a) Your preferred start and end times — continuous 7am-4pm or 8am-5pm, OR a split shift (one possible example: 7am-12pm + 2pm-5pm). (b) Which 5 days you would prefer to work. Thursday and Friday are required. (c)  Are you available to work Saturday morning and/or Sunday morning? (Not required, but desirable — please tell us either way.)



5. In your
 to us, confirm your home environment is QUIET and suitable for phone calls during USA business hours. Describe your setup specifically: room/location in your home, headset model, internet speed (Mbps down/up), wired or WiFi, number of monitors with size and resolution of each, current operating system, and any backup power or backup internet you have.



6. When you
 me start your
 subject line with "JOB2605A FIRSTNAME LASTNAME" so your
 won't go to spam.



I reply promptly to 100% of applicants who follow ALL of these instructions.



Thank you for your interest, I look forward to meeting you!



Mr Parker

title: Digital PR outreach and Media relationships
description:
Digital PR Pitch Specialist:



We're looking for a dynamic and tenacious Digital PR Pitch Specialist to join our team. s.

title: Professional Video Editor + ElevenLabs AI Specialist for Ad Video
description:
I recently filmed a professional ad video for my company, Home Service Blueprint, and I’m looking for an experienced video editor who can help turn it into a polished, high-converting video.



I need someone who can review my raw video, make strong cuts where needed, improve the pacing, and help shape the video into the style I’m looking for. I will provide a reference video/link so you can see the exact type of editing style, pacing, captions, visuals, and overall feel I want.



This project may also require ElevenLabs, so you must be experienced with ElevenLabs voice tools, AI voice creation, dubbing, voice cleanup, or voice enhancement.



This first project will be for 2 videos. If the first project goes well, this can turn into ongoing paid video editing work.



Responsibilities:



* Edit 2 professional ad videos for Home Service Blueprint

* Review the reference video/link and match the editing style as closely as possible

* Make clean cuts and improve the pacing of the video

* Add professional captions, graphics, music, b-roll, and transitions where needed

* Use ElevenLabs for AI voice, dubbing, voice enhancement, or voice creation

* Help create polished ads that feel professional, clear, and engaging

* Make sure the final videos are suitable for social media ads and online marketing

* Follow creative direction carefully and communicate clearly throughout the project



Requirements:



* Strong experience editing professional ad videos

* Expert knowledge of ElevenLabs

* Experience with AI video/audio tools

* Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, captions, hooks, and ad structure

* Ability to match a reference video style

* Experience editing videos for Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube, or online ads

* Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and able to complete revisions quickly

* Must be able to show examples of previous video editing work



Reference Video:

I will provide a reference link showing the exact style I want. Please review the link and let me know if you can create a similar version using my video.



Video Url: 







How to Apply:

Please send the following:



1. Your video editing portfolio

2. Examples of ad videos you’ve edited

3. Examples of work using ElevenLabs or other AI voice/video tools

4. The editing and AI tools you use

5. Your rate

6. A short explanation of how you would approach editing this video based on the reference link



To confirm you read the full post, please include the word BLUEPRINT at the end of your application.

description:

 and Google to create genuine growth. If you are tired of spending budgets like a machine and want to truly master multi-thousand dollar campaigns, this is the position for you.

title: Full-Time AI Automation Specialist (GHL + N8N + Make.com)
description:
About Us



We're a fast-growing US-based marketing agency serving local businesses and residential contractors across multiple verticals. We move fast, build smart systems, and we're looking for someone who can keep up with — and push — our automation game.

This is a long-term role with real growth potential. We invest in our team's tools and skills, including a paid Claude AI membership to supercharge your productivity.

- Designing multi-step workflows that connect our CRM, lead delivery, ad platforms, and internal tools

- Building more advanced custom solutions using Google Apps Script or Python when needed (we'll support you with Claude for the heavy lifting)

- Documenting your builds clearly so the team can maintain them





What We're Looking For Required:



- 1+ year hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — sub-accounts, automations, workflows, snapshots

- 1+ year hands-on experience with 
 (Integromat) — multi-step scenarios, error handling, webhooks

- Self-starter who can take a goal and figure out the build



Nice to Have:



Google Apps Script experience

Python scripting

Webhook/API integration experience

Experience working with US-based agencies or marketing teams

Familiarity with Meta Ads Manager, 
 webhooks, or Google Workspace APIs





What You Get



- $1,200 – $1,500 USD/month (based on experience)

- Paid Claude AI membership to enhance your productivity and help you tackle complex builds

- Full-time stable role (no gigs, no project-hopping)

- Direct collaboration with leadership and founders so your work has visible impact

- Room to grow into a senior/lead automation role as we scale

title: Virtual Assistant (Dental Practice Growth & Patient Experience Coordinator)
description:
Remote | Part-Time ? Full-Time Growth Opportunity



About Us

Amore Dentistry is a modern, holistic dental practice focused on high-level patient care, efficiency, and a luxury experience. We are growing quickly and looking for a detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant who can help manage patient communication, scheduling, and business operations—while evolving into a key role in marketing and practice growth.



Role Overview



This is NOT a basic assistant role. You will start by managing patient communication and scheduling but will grow into helping oversee systems, patient experience, and eventually social media + operational strategy.



We are looking for someone sharp, organized, and highly reliable who wants to grow with a business long-term.



Core Responsibilities (Phase 1)



Patient Communication & Scheduling



Answer incoming calls (via VOIP system) professionally and warmly

Respond to texts,
s, and website inquiries

Schedule, confirm, and reschedule patient appointments

Manage daily schedule to optimize production and efficiency



Patient Follow-Up & Experience



Follow up with new leads and unscheduled treatment

Send reminders and reactivation messages

Request and track patient reviews (Google, etc.)

Ensure every patient interaction feels high-touch and personalized



Administrative Support



Maintain accurate patient records

Coordinate forms, paperwork, and onboarding

Assist with insurance/basic admin tasks if needed

Growth Responsibilities (Phase 2 ? 3)



As you grow into the role, you will:



Help manage and improve office systems and workflows

Assist with KPI tracking (production, case acceptance, etc.)

Oversee patient journey from first contact ? completed treatment

Manage and post on social media (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

Coordinate marketing initiatives and campaigns

Act as a “remote office manager” / operations lead

Ideal Candidate

Strong communication skills (friendly, confident, articulate)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive problem-solver (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

Comfortable handling patients and sensitive conversations

Tech-savvy (can quickly learn software systems)

Growth mindset — wants to evolve into a bigger role

Experience in dental, medical, or concierge client services is a PLUS

Tools You May Use

Scheduling software (Dentrix, OpenDental, ORYX etc.)

VOIP phone systems

Google Workspace

CRM / patient communication tools

Social media platforms

Schedule & Compensation

Remote position

Starting part-time (20–30 hrs/week), opportunity for full-time

Flexible hours, but must overlap with business hours (EST)

Competitive hourly pay based on experience

Performance-based bonuses available

What Success Looks Like

A smooth, organized schedule with minimal gaps

Patients feel cared for and consistently followed up with

Increased case acceptance and patient retention

Strong online presence and growing reviews

How to Apply



Please submit:



A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Your resume

A brief answer to:

“How would you handle a patient who is hesitant to schedule treatment?”

Why This Role is Different

I WOULD LIKE TO DO AN INTERVIEW, THIS WILL BE FUN :D



This is an opportunity to grow into a high-level operations + marketing role within a rapidly expanding dental brand. If you’re looking for something long-term where you can take ownership and grow, this is it.

title: Project Manager – Construction Operations
description:
Join a growing commercial construction-related company and play a key role in managing projects from award through completion while supporting bid coordination and pipeline follow-ups.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable working across both operations and sales support. You’ll help ensure projects are delivered smoothly while maintaining strong pipeline visibility, follow-up discipline, and communication between customers, field teams, and internal stakeholders.



We’re looking for someone who can take ownership, manage multiple moving parts, and thrive in a fast-paced environment where project execution and operational coordination go hand in hand.



Responsibilities:

- Take ownership of projects from handoff through completion.

- Coordinate project scheduling, logistics, timelines, and resource allocation.

- Work closely with customers, contractors, field teams, and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth project delivery.

- Support installation planning and help ensure projects meet quality and compliance standards.

- Monitor project progress and proactively help resolve issues that may affect timelines or customer experience.

- Manage bid follow-ups and pipeline coordination across assigned regions.

- Track, update, and maintain accurate opportunities and project data within HubSpot CRM.

- Follow up with contractors, estimators, and decision-makers regarding outstanding bids and active opportunities.

- Identify priority opportunities and maintain organized follow-up processes.

- Support outside sales representatives by providing project updates, pipeline visibility, and operational coordination.

- Help improve internal workflows, CRM processes, and project tracking systems.

- Assist in maintaining strong communication between sales and operations teams throughout the project lifecycle.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience in project management, construction coordination, operations, or related industries.

- Previous experience supporting commercial construction, specialty contracting, healthcare construction environments, or field operations is highly preferred.

- Strong understanding of project coordination, scheduling, and operational workflows.

- Experience managing multiple projects, timelines, and priorities simultaneously.

- Experience with CRM systems such as HubSpot is strongly preferred.

- Comfortable handling bid follow-ups, pipeline tracking, and customer coordination.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive.

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced and entrepreneurial environment.

- Strong problem-solving and follow-through skills.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US or Canada-based clients is preferred.

- Must be available to work graveyard hours aligned with U.S. time zones.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 75,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link and copy and paste this Job ID: rectOmE5kGLVkiZCZ into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job rectOmE5kGLVkiZCZ!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

description:
Remote | $3.50–$6.00 USD/hr | Long-term | Direct Hire

Remote / WFH Long-ter
ta Ads Google Ads AI Tools



We're an AI-powered SaaS agency that builds systems, not just campaigns. We're looking for a sharp digital marketer based in the Philippines who understands how Meta and Google algorithms actually work — and uses data to back up every decision.



This is a long-term, full remote role with real room to grow. We start at 4 hours a day, and if you deliver, the scope expands.



What you'll do:

Set up, monitor, and optimize Meta and Google Ads campaigns

Track performance metrics and adjust budgets based on real data

Kill what isn't working. Scale what is.

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to speed up research, copy, and reporting

Bring ideas — not just execution



You're a fit if you:

Have run Meta or Google Ads campaigns before (personal projects count)

Research fast and think independently

The details:

4 hrs/day to start · 6 days/week · Monday–Saturday (EST hours)

Performance bonuses and expanded hours for top performers

That's your application.

title: Web Designer & Developer (Virtual Assistant)
description:
About the Role



We are a growing agency looking for a talented and reliable Web Designer & Developer to join our remote team. In this role, you will be the creative and technical engine behind our clients' websites, designing beautiful mockups in Figma and bringing them to life on WordPress. You will also support clients on Wix and Squarespace with ongoing updates and maintenance.

This is a full-time position with consistent work, clear communication, and a supportive team. We're looking for someone who takes ownership of their work, communicates proactively, and delivers high-quality output on time.



What You'll Be Doing



• Design professional website mockups in Figma (primarily 2 mockups per project, desktop and mobile views)

• Develop and build websites on WordPress based on approved Figma designs

• Perform ongoing website updates and edits for clients on Wix and Squarespace

• Ensure websites are responsive, fast-loading, and cross-browser compatible

• Implement basic on-page SEO best practices during development

• Communicate project progress and flag any blockers or timeline concerns proactively

• Revise designs and builds based on client and internal feedback

• Maintain organized project files and documentation



Requirements



Design Skills



• Strong proficiency in Figma, you can design clean, modern, and client-ready mockups independently

• Good eye for layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

• Experience designing for both desktop and mobile

• Experience in graphic design, creating ads for social media when needed



Development Skills



• Solid experience building websites on WordPress (themes, Elementor or similar page builders, custom CSS)

• Comfortable making updates and edits on Wix and Squarespace

• Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS

• Ability to translate a Figma design into a pixel-accurate website build



Work Style & Communication



• Fluent in written English, clear, professional communication is a must

• Reliable with deadlines and able to manage your own time effectively

• Comfortable using tools like Slack, Trello, Asana, or similar project management platforms

• Responds to messages within business hours and proactively communicates updates

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with WooCommerce or basic e-commerce setups

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, or basic SEO tools

• Experience creating amazing graphic designs in Canva or Adobe tools

• Knowledge of website speed optimization (image compression, caching plugins, etc.)



What We Offer



• $7/hr Paid Semi Monthly 15th and last day of the month (tracked)

• Full-time, fully remote position, work from wherever you are

• Stable, ongoing work with a consistent flow of projects

• Supportive team environment with clear briefs and feedback

• Long-term opportunity for the right candidate, we're not looking for short-term help



How to Apply



If you think you are the right person for this role, please create and send us a 1-minute video introducing yourself, sharing your background, and explaining why you would be the best person for this role. Please also forward your resume and your earliest available start date to Contact at umteencompany dot com. Candidates will not be interviewed if you do not send a 1-minute video.

title: Sales Assistant
description:
Now Hiring — Transfer Agent + Customer Care Specialist (Solar Enrollment)

We're hiring for two distinct phone-based roles. Both are remote, part-time, long-term, and require high-level spoken English.



Timeline (must be available)

Apply + voice recording: ASAP

Trial shift: Friday May 1 – Saturday May 2

Hiring decision: Saturday May 2

Paid training: Saturday May 2 – Sunday May 3

Live start date: Monday, May 4

Only apply if you can commit to this timeline.



About us

Community solar enrollment company helping US homeowners save on their electricity bills. Steady flow of warm inbound leads from opt-in forms.



Role 1: Transfer Agent (2 openings)

What you'll do: Run a 3-line power dialer (Wave Dialer), calling warm inbound leads who didn't connect with our AI on the first attempt. On pickup: deliver a 30–45 second greeting, confirm interest, warm-transfer the lead to a US-based closer. You do NOT close the sale. Your job is to qualify and transfer.



Hours & pay:



$6–$10/hr USD (final rate based on English fluency assessed during the paid trial shift), paid bi-weekly via Wise/PayPal

30 hours/week, 6 days/week (Mon–Sat)

Choose one shift on US Central Time:

Shift A — Morning: 10am–3pm CT

Shift B — Evening: 3pm–8pm CT

Dialing volume: ~150 dials/hour on a 3-line power dialer.



Role 2: Customer Care Specialist (1 opening)

What you'll do: Handle post-enrollment customer interactions and assist on three-way calls during the qualification process:



Welcome calls with newly enrolled customers

Three-way calls with the customer + Lifeline (when qualification needs verification or temp password)

Three-way calls with the customer + utility companies (account verification, payment arrangements)

Document outcomes in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

Hours & pay:



$6–$10/hr USD (final rate based on English fluency assessed during the paid trial shift), paid bi-weekly via Wise/PayPal

30 hours/week, Mon–Fri, ~9am–3pm CT (may flex by 1–2 hours)

Required for BOTH roles

High-level English with very minimal / near-native accent. You will be on calls with US homeowners and US government agencies — clear, fluent, easy-to-understand English is non-negotiable.

1+ year customer-facing phone experience (outbound, customer service, or call center)

Patient demeanor (especially for Role 2 — government three-way calls can run long)

Detail-oriented; able to take notes and enter data into a CRM in real time

Reliable wired internet (25+ Mbps)

USB noise-cancelling headset

Quiet workspace

Stable PC/laptop (Windows or Mac)

Available during US Central Time hours

Long-term commitment (6+ months)

Available for the timeline above (live by Mon May 4)

Bonus (not required)

Solar / energy / utility industry experience

GoHighLevel (GHL) experience

For Role 1: Wave Dialer / Wavv / Mojo / ReadyMode experience

For Role 2: Experience with US government benefits programs (Lifeline, LIHEAP, Medicaid, SNAP, SSI)

What we provide

All necessary tools (Wave Dialer, GoHighLevel CRM, Slack)

Pre-loaded lead lists / scripts / call procedures

Onboarding + paid training (1–2 days)

2-hour paid trial shift before final hire (final pay rate set after trial)

How to apply

60-second voice recording of you reading this script: "Hi, this is [your name] calling from Saveyourenergy. I'm following up on the form you filled out about lowering your electricity bill through community solar. Do you have just a 
nt? Great — let me connect you with one of our solar specialists right now."

Indicate which role you're applying for:

Role 1: Transfer Agent — Shift A (10am–3pm CT)

Role 1: Transfer Agent — Shift B (3pm–8pm CT)

Role 2: Customer Care Specialist (9am–3pm CT, Mon–Fri)

Open to either (we'll match you based on fit)

Briefly describe the most complex customer-facing phone situation you've handled and how you resolved it

Confirm you can start by Monday, May 4 (trial shift Fri May 1 / Sat May 2; training Sat-Sun)

title: Acquisition Lead Manager
description:
Property Seller Solutions is hiring a driven and disciplined outbound lead manager to generate new real estate opportunities through proactive cold calling and database follow-up.



This is a revenue-generating role focused on outbound activity, lead qualification, and appointment setting. The right candidate will be comfortable making a high volume of calls, navigating rejection, and building rapport quickly over the phone.



Key Responsibilities

- Make outbound calls to new and aged lead lists

- Identify property owners’ motivation, timeline, and decision-making authority

- Pre-qualify opportunities based on company criteria

- Set qualified appointments for acquisitions team

- Maintain accurate CRM documentation

- Follow structured call cadences and follow-up systems

- Assist in reactivating dormant opportunities in the database



Qualifications

- Strong verbal communication skills (solid English skills are required)

- High level of confidence on the phone

- Comfortable asking direct financial and property-related questions

- Highly organized and disciplined with follow-up

- Able to meet daily activity metrics and performance expectations and provide daily activity reports

- Prior phone sales or call center experience preferred

- Real estate experience is a plus but not required



Performance Expectations

- 300+ outbound dials per day (subject to adjustments)

- Consistent talk time and meaningful conversations

- Appointment and qualification targets tied to performance bonuses



Compensation Structure

- Base pay

- Bonuses tied to qualified appointments and deal performance

- Growth path into closing the deals you set 



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a production-based environment and wants a clear path to higher earning potential. Ongoing training with elite cold callers will be provided for optimal performance based on lead type and best practices.



As part of our hiring process, we require all candidates to complete a Predictive Index (PI) assessment before moving forward to interviews. This helps us better understand your strengths and how you might fit within our team. We will contact those who are a great fit for this type of role.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
Axisbridge Medical Staffing is a fast growing healthcare BPO placing HIPAA-compliant virtual medical billers and administrators with independent US healthcare practices. We work exclusively with the US market and our clients are preferably small to medium sized independent medical practice owners, office managers, and billing directors across mental health, chiropractic, physical therapy, and primary care.



We are hiring one elite cold caller who has spent years on the phone, knows exactly how to navigate gatekeepers, handle objections, and book qualified appointments with busy medical professionals.



What you will do:

Call independent US healthcare practices from a verified, pre-researched lead list you will create from a database we will provide 

Follow a proven script to uncover billing and administrative pain points

Book qualified discovery calls directly into the closer's calendar

Log every call, outcome, and follow-up note in a simple CRM tracker

Follow up on warm prospects who did not book on the first call

Hit a minimum target of 50 outbound calls per day

Provide daily call reports with outcomes, objections encountered, and booking rate



What you earn:

$3 per hour base: paid weekly

$150 bonus for every client that signs from your booked call

Your guaranteed base is $360 per month

One close per month brings your total to $510

Two closes per month brings your total to $710

Three closes per month brings your total to $910

Four closes per month brings your total to $1,110

No ceiling on commission — every client you help close adds $200 to your earnings



Minimum requirements:

Minimum 5 years experience in outbound cold calling or appointment setting

Minimum 3 years experience specifically calling US-based clients — healthcare, insurance, or medical industry strongly preferred

Proven track record of hitting or exceeding daily call targets and booking quotas

Deep experience handling common sales objections — not interested, we already have someone, send me an
, call me back later

Experience navigating gatekeepers to reach decision makers — practice owners, office managers, billing directors

Previous BPO experience in a US-facing healthcare or medical role is strongly preferred

Excellent spoken English with a clear neutral accent — US clients must be able to understand you effortlessly on the first call

Strong professional telephone manner and the ability to build rapport quickly with busy medical professionals

Reliable high-speed internet connection, noise-cancelling headset, and a quiet professional working environment

Available Monday to Friday during US Central or Eastern business hours

Self-managed, disciplined, and comfortable working independently without supervision

Experience working with a CRM or call tracking system

You are the right person if:

You have spent years making calls and you know exactly how to get a decision maker on the phone, uncover their pain, and book the next step. You back yourself completely to perform and you want to be paid based on results not hours. You understand the US healthcare market, you speak confidently with medical professionals, and you treat every call as an opportunity to help a practice solve a real problem.



To apply you must send the following, incomplete applications will not be considered:

Your CV with specific cold calling and appointment setting experience clearly detailed including industries called, years of experience, and average daily call volume.

title: Urgent Hiring | Architectural Designer | U.S. Client Experience Required | Join Now!
description:

We don’t just build homes — we build efficient systems, strong teams, and scalable operations.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable tea
mber who can help support design, drafting, revisions, and project coordination across multiple projects.

Coordination & Project Support

-Coordinate with vendors and tea
mbers

-Track drawing updates, pending items, and revision progress

Accuracy & Risk Management

-Maintain accuracy, clarity, and consistency in all work

-Help keep projects moving by completing revisions and deliverables on time 



**What We’re Looking For**

Required

-Degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Construction, or related field

-At least 2+ years experience in architectural design, drafting, or construction documents

-Experience in U.S. residential construction projects

-Strong ability to prepare, read, and understand plans, elevations, sections, and detailed drawings

-Experience in photo realistic rendering based on floor plans

-Proficiency in architectural drafting/design software

-Experience working closely with architects on design development, drawing coordination, and revisions

-Highly organized and detail-oriented

-Strong English communication (written & verbal)



**Preferred (Big Plus)**

-Familiarity with permit sets, construction documents, and project coordination

-Experience working with revisions, redlines, and consultant or team coordination

**Tools You May Use**

-AutoCAD/Revit

-SketchUp

-Bluebeam

-Adobe Photoshop/InDesign

-Google Drive, Google Sheets, and Excel



**Perks/Benefits**

– 10 days paid time off (PTO)/holiday

– Performance-based bonuses per property sold

– SV anniversary & birthday gifts

– 13th Month Pay with the potential to earn 2–3× based on performance and company results



**How to Apply (IMPORTANT)**

To be considered, submit the following:

title: Meta Ads Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
At The Equine Practice Company and Horse Health HQ, we empower equine veterinarians globally through elite education and community. We are a high-performing core team of 9. While we live by our values of Innovation and Fun, we are a results-driven company with ambitious financial targets.



The businesses have reached a stage where we are prioritising internal integration. We are moving away from the 'agency model' to bring this role in-house, ensuring our Meta strategy is fully embedded in our daily operations and core team.



We are looking for a Performance-Focused Media Buyer who treats our ad accounts as their own. You aren’t just a "button pusher" - you are a strategic partner responsible for driving consistent, high-quality lead generation and maximizing ROI.



What You’ll Own

1. Campaign Architecture: Build and launch campaigns (Lead Gen, Conversions, Awareness) from scratch using best-practice structures.



2. Aggressive Optimization: Daily monitoring of bids, budgets, and placements. You identify winners and kill losers without being asked.



3. Audience Management: Expertly navigate custom audiences, lookalikes, and deep interest-based targeting for our niche equine market.



4. Creative Testing: Set up rigorous A/B tests, analyze the data, and flag winning creative for scaling.



5. Technical Operations: Act as the internal lead for Meta Business Manager. You must be able to troubleshoot page access, asset permissions, and portfolio connections live.



6. Tracking & QA: Verify Pixel fires, CAPI, conversion events, and maintain 100% UTM hygiene. Zero tolerance for sloppy trafficking.



7. Reporting: Weekly summaries with clear insights—tell us what happened, why, and what we are doing next.



Who You Are

1. Experience: 2+ years of hands-on Meta Ads experience managing $5,000–$10,000+ USD monthly spend.



2. Strategic Mindset: You understand lead gen funnels and customer acquisition. You don't wait for instructions; you identify opportunities and recommend improvements.



3. Technical Troubleshooting: You are confident working inside Meta Business Manager to fix backend issues when they happen.



4. Fast & Accurate: You move quickly but have a "measure twice, cut once" mentality.



5. Equine-Passionate: You are excited about helping veterinarians and improving horse welfare globally.



Important Notes

1. This is not a role for someone who requires constant direction or simply executes tasks without thinking. We need a self-starter who takes ownership of results. If you need hand-holding, this is not the role for you.



2. Agencies will be ignored. We are looking for an in-house tea
mber for the long term.



3. We are an entirely English-speaking team. Fluency in verbal and written English is non-negotiable. You must be comfortable and confident communicating complex technical issues clearly to our team. Our current team is based in Australia (3), United States (1), The Philippines (4) and India (1).



How to Apply



When you prepare your application for this role., please provide the following:



1. Please share a brief summary of your Meta Ads experience and the largest monthly spend you have managed.

2. An example of a complex Business Manager/Asset issue you resolved.

3. A short explanation of how you approach "Creative Testing."

4.This is a full-time role (40 hours/week) designed for someone looking to grow with us long-term. Please confirm your availability for this schedule. If you are an exceptional candidate but have a minor existing commitment, please specify the maximum number of hours you can consistently dedicate to us each week.

5. We are based in Australia, please confirm you are available to work from 9am - 5pm Brisbane time.

title: Accounts Receivable (AR) Specialist – QuickBooks Online Expert
description:

Axis Water Technologies is a growing, fast-paced company focused on delivering high-quality water treatment solutions across multiple markets. We are looking for a highly skilled and detail-oriented Accounts Receivable (AR) Specialist to join our team and help maintain the financial health and accuracy of our operations.



Position Overview:



We are seeking an AR expert who understands the full accounting cycle—not just invoicing and collections. This role requires someone who can confidently work within QuickBooks Online, understands how transactions impact financial statements, and takes ownership of keeping receivables accurate, current, and aggressively managed.



This person must be strong in communication, and completing tasks and understanding how AR affects the Balance Sheet and Profit & Loss Statement.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage Accounts Receivable, request remittances, payment matching, and account reconciliation

Reconcile customer accounts and give notice of billing discrepancies

Maintain accurate records and support financial reporting with clean, audit-ready books

Work closely with internal teams and customers to resolve account issues quickly



Qualifications:

 Certified in QuickBooks Online (REQUIRED)

 Strong understanding of accounting principles, including how AR impacts the Balance Sheet & Profit and Loss Statement

 Proven experience in Accounts Receivable, Bookkeeping

 High attention to detail and accuracy

 Strong organizational and time management skills

 Self-motivated, dependable, and able to meet deadlines



What We’re Looking For:

A driven and dedicated professional who takes ownership of accounts

Someone who understands that AR is not just posting payments—it’s protecting the financial health of the company

A strong communicator who can be professional, and solutions-oriented

A team player who is proactive and thrives in a fast-paced environment

title: E-Commerce Shipping Analyst
description:
E-Commerce Shipping Analyst

Full-Time | US Mountain Standard Time (MST)



Overview

We are seeking a highly analytical E-Commerce Shipping Analyst to own and optimize our DTC shipping costs and performance, with a direct impact on margin and efficiency. This role focuses on understanding what we’re being charged, identifying cost drivers, and improving shipping efficiency across every order.

This is not a traditional shipping or warehouse role. You will focus on analyzing parcel shipping costs (UPS, FedEx, USPS), improving packaging and dimensional efficiency, and optimizing shipping logic to reduce overall cost and improve ROI.



Key Responsibilities

Shipping Cost Analysis & Optimization



Analyze shipping costs across parcel shipments to identify key cost drivers (zones, dimensional weight, surcharges, service levels)

Develop reports and insights to track cost-per-shipment and identify savings opportunities

Identify and implement initiatives to reduce shipping costs and improve overall efficiency

Carrier & Service Optimization



Evaluate carrier performance, rates, and service levels

Optimize carrier mix, service selection, and shipping rules based on cost and performance

Support rate reviews and ensure accurate billing across carriers

Packaging & Dimensional Optimization



Optimize packaging, carton sizes, and master pack quantities to reduce dimensional weight and shipping costs

Conduct packaging and dimensional weight experiments to validate cost-saving opportunities

Improve cube utilization and overall shipping efficiency

Shipping Systems & Data



Work within shipping platforms (e.g., Shippo or similar) to improve automation and shipping logic

Maintain accurate shipping data and reporting systems

Audit carrier invoices and identify discrepancies, refunds, and surcharge issues

Cross-Functional Collaboration



Collaborate with warehouse and product teams to implement packaging and shipping improvements

Help improve shipping workflows, rules, and operational efficiency





Qualifications

Core Requirements



2–5+ years of experience in shipping, logistics, e-commerce operations, or transportation analysis

Experience with parcel shipping (UPS, FedEx, USPS) in a DTC or e-commerce environment

Strong understanding of shipping cost drivers (dimensional weight, zones, surcharges, etc.)

Analytical Skills



Proficiency in Excel for data analysis and reporting

Ability to identify patterns, cost drivers, and optimization opportunities

Highly analytical, detail-oriented, and cost-focused

Nice to Have



Experience with shipping platforms (Shippo, ShipStation, EasyPost, etc.)

Experience with packaging optimization or dimensional weight reduction

Familiarity with LTL or freight shipping



Schedule

Full-time position

Must work US Mountain Standard Time (MST) hours



TO APPLY:

Please apply with 8 or more apply points

Attach your resume

Subject line to say " E-Commerce Shipping Analyst "

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---

The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.

Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---

Why We Need You

We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---

What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.

2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.

3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.

4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---

The Daily Reality

Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---

We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---

Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---

Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---

Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---

Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---

How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status



Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---

Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi

We look forward to meeting you Monday

This person will be our potential clients first point of contact and first impression of JEM, so they need to have great English skills and people skills, be compassionate and patient yet have good boundaries and be very organized.  

Hard Skills needed:  Answer phone and interact with clients, share about our practice, place them with a clinician, and schedule their first appointment.  Return calls same day.  When you apply please let me know how much you love horses. Operate practice software/electronic health record and schedule clients, fill out profiles, create reports to
 to owner. Create
s and respond to
s daily.  Please use 4 Apply Points when you apply. Create systems for workflow with owner. 

Soft Skills needed:  Takes initiative, self starter,  compassionate, patient, very organized and punctual, creative thinker, conversational, has good boundaries, cares about others and is a natural helper.

title: Sales Representative
description:
Part-Time Sales Follow-Up VA for Auto Detailing Business



Role summary



We are hiring a part-time VA to help with lead follow-up, past-client reactivation, review follow-up, and simple sales/admin support for a mobile detailing and ceramic coating business. This is not a generic admin role. We need someone who is strong at communication, organized with follow-up, and capable of helping turn old conversations into booked work.



What you will do



- Reply to inbound leads by text and

- Follow up leads that went cold

- Reach back out to past clients to get them rebooked

- Ask happy customers for reviews

- Update customer and lead status inside Fieldd CRM

- Flag hot leads that need owner attention

- After training, begin helping with phone follow-up



What matters most



- Strong written English

- Strong spoken English

- Friendly but confident communication

- Good follow-up habits

- Comfort with sales conversations

- Organized and reliable work style

- Able to learn offers, pricing, and customer tone quickly

- available in the 9AM-5PM PST hours



 Nice to have



- Appointment setting experience

- Experience with local service businesses

- Experience with automotive detailing, home services, or similar businesses

- Experience using a CRM, Google Sheets, or lead tracking systems



Hours and structure



- Part-time to start then up to full time as demand increases

- About 15 to 20 hours per week

- Text and
 first

- Phone follow-up later if the fit is strong



Pay



- $4 to $8 per hour depending on experience

- +$3 per booked job

- +$2 per review landed



To apply

1. Apply to this position

2. Send a short intro

3. Share your relevant follow-up, sales support, or VA experience

4. Write a sample message to an old lead who asked for a quote but never booked

5. Write a sample message to a past client you want to rebook

6. Include the word oakley at the top so we know you read the full post

description:
We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant who can provide day-to-day support across admin, client management, content, and personal tasks. This role is ideal for someone detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with shifting time zones (South America & Europe).



1. Responsibilities



A. Administrative Support



- Manage
s, respond to inquiries, and categorize messages for priority responses.

- Schedule meetings, appointments, and manage calendars.

- Organize digital files, documents, and CRM records.

- Maintain task lists and send reminders for important deadlines.

- Assist in processing invoices and managing basic financial documentation.



B. Client & Sales Support



- Respond to client inquiries via
, social media, and chat.

- Follow up with prospects and leads based on predefined workflows.

- Update CRM and sales tracking systems with new leads and deal statuses.

- Assist in onboarding new clients (sending contracts, welcome
s, intake forms).



C. Social Media & Content Support

- Assist in posting content for Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

- Edit and repurpose video content for YouTube, Instagram Reels, and other short-form platforms (cutting clips, adding subtitles, and optimizing for engagement).



D. Recruitment & HR Support

- Post job openings on recruitment platforms and screen applications.

- Schedule interviews and coordinate with potential hires.

- Maintain a pipeline of talented sales closers and other key hires.



E. Personal Life Task Management



- Schedule personal appointments (doctor, dentist, fitness, travel, etc.).

- Book reservations (restaurants, hotels, flights, car rentals, etc.).

- Online shopping, gift ordering, and personal errands (as needed).

- Research and book personal development programs, events, or networking opportunities.

- Remind and manage key dates (birthdays, anniversaries, special occasions).

- Coordinate travel logistics, itinerary planning, and necessary documentation.

- Assist in managing personal finance tasks (paying bills, setting reminders, tracking expenses).





Be willing to work flexible hours based on my adjusting time zone throughout South America and Europe. Willing to work 6 days per days per week.



To apply, please send:



1. Your CV

2. Portfolio (if available)

3. Loom video showing the same experience related to the job

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Customer Service Representative – Flow Rentals (Remote/Local)



Company: Flow Rentals

Location: Remote / Richmond, VA Preferred

Position Type: Part-Time



About Us



Flow Rentals is a fast-growing car rental company focused on providing reliable vehicles to rideshare drivers and everyday renters. We specialize in a smooth onboarding process and hands-off solutions for both renters and investors.



Position Overview



We are looking for a Customer Service Representative to act as the front line of our business. This role is responsible for handling inbound inquiries, qualifying leads, and guiding potential renters through our onboarding process.



Schedule, Pay & Payouts

Schedule: Monday – Friday

Hours: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Eastern Standard Time)

Pay: $3.25 per hour

Payouts: Biweekly

Key Responsibilities

Answer inbound phone calls from interested leads

Guide potential renters through Flow Rentals’ onboarding process

Communicate with clients professionally and efficiently

Respond to inquiries on social media 
, Instagram, etc.)

Qualify leads and schedule phone calls for the team

Maintain organized records of leads and follow-ups

Qualifications

Minimum 2 years of customer service or related experience required

Strong communication and customer service skills

Comfortable speaking on the phone and handling objections

Experience with social media messaging and lead generation preferred

Organized and detail-oriented

Self-motivated and reliable



How to Apply



To be considered for this position, you must submit the following:



Your resume

A 1–2 minute introduction video covering:

Who you are

Your past experience

How you can contribute to Flow Rentals’ customer service



Send all application materials to:

Anyone who responds directly to this job post will be automatically disqualified.

Incomplete applications will not be considered.

You must follow all application instructions and submit your materials via
 to be eligible.

title: Job Title: Billing & Invoicing Specialist (Full-Time VA) — Marketing Agency
description:
About Us



We're a marketing agency working with high-ticket financial services clients. We run a team of salespeople (setters and closers) and marketing contractors, and we need someone meticulous to own our billing operations end-to-end.



What You'll Do

You'll be the person who makes sure money moves correctly in and out of the business. Specifically:



- Manage our billing system and own the full invoicing cycle for clients

- Calculate and process commission payouts for salespeople (setters, closers) based on deal data — accuracy is non-negotiable here

- Process payments and reimbursements for marketing contractors (UGC creators, media buyers, freelancers)

- Reconcile invoices against payments received and flag discrepancies

- Maintain organized records of every transaction — who got paid, how much, when, and why

- Chase down missing information from team leads when payouts are unclear

- Send payment confirmations and follow up on overdue client invoices

- Build and maintain a clean monthly close process so we always know where we stand

- Identify errors, overpayments, or missed billings before they become problems



Who You Are



2+ years of experience in billing, bookkeeping, accounts payable/receivable, or finance VA work



Obsessive about accuracy — you double-check your work and catch your own mistakes before anyone else does



Advanced Google Sheets skills — formulas, pivot tables, conditional formatting (we run everything in Sheets) Comfortable with numbers and reconciling multi-source data



Organized to a fault — if something falls through the cracks on your watch, you treat it as a serious problem



Proactive communicator — you raise issues early instead of waiting to be asked



Discreet and trustworthy — you'll see sensitive financial information daily



Strong English



Why This Role

You'll work directly with the founder and own a critical function. No layers of bureaucracy. If you're sharp, you'll have a long-term home here with raises tied to performance.



How to Apply

To filter out copy-paste applicants, please do the following:



- Start your message with the word "Reconciled" so I know you read this carefully.

- Record a Loom video (3–5 minutes) walking me through the billing, invoicing, or finance work you've done in previous roles. 

-Show me actual examples on screen if possible — spreadsheets you've built, processes you've owned, problems you've solved.



Applications missing either of the above will not be reviewed.

title: EXPERT LEVEL - Full-Time GoHighLevel Systems Builder (CRM + Automation + Pipelines)
description:
Job Description



We are a high-level revenue systems company that builds comprehensive CRM and automation systems for businesses that use GoHighLevel.



This is NOT a basic VA or funnel builder role.



We are looking for someone who understands how to build systems that drive revenue, including pipelines, automation, follow-up sequences, and CRM structure.



You will be working directly with the founder to build and deploy systems for real clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Build and manage pipelines inside GoHighLevel

Create automation workflows (SMS,
, triggers, follow-ups)

title: Phone Support Specialist (WFH)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and confident communicator with strong English skills to handle client calls and support a growing U.S.-based business.

_____________________



ABOUT YOU: 

You are a capable, confident woman who takes pride in how you show up professionally: focused, reliable, and someone others can depend on.



You treat your work like it’s your own business.



You don’t just “answer calls.” You connect, influence, and move conversations forward.



You are sharp, quick-thinking, and confident speaking in English. You don’t rely on scripts to sound natural. You know how to build rapport with someone new.



You are not looking for your next job. You are looking for a long-term role where you can stay and become indispensable.

_____________________



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

• You love speaking with people - the idea of confidently guiding clients, answering questions, and helping them move forward energizes you.

• You are calm, patient, and solution-focused under pressure - you don’t get flustered, you take control.

• You speak exceptional English with a clear voice and minimal accent - easily understood by U.S. callers.

• You can build rapport quickly - not robotic, not scripted, but natural and engaging.

• You are comfortable handling inbound sales inquiries and guiding warm leads toward clear next steps.

• You are resourceful and think on your feet - you don’t freeze when situations change.

• You are intelligent and proactive - you don’t wait to be told every step.

• You are comfortable influencing conversations - not aggressive sales, but confident guidance.

_____________________



READ THIS CAREFULLY

• If you do not naturally know how to build rapport with someone new, this position is NOT for you.

• If you prefer doing the minimum and logging off or clocking in/out, this position is NOT for you.

• If you are the type of woman who steps up, supports the business, and takes pride in doing excellent work — you will do very well here.

_____________________



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Work from home experience

• Night shift experience

• At least two years of work experience within the same company

• Executive assistant OR BPO experience

• Phone experience (ex: Phone customer support OR Phone sales experience)

_____________________



MINDSET REQUIREMENTS

• You take ownership - you treat the business like it’s yours

• You go the extra mile without being asked

• You are reliable, consistent, and professional every day

• You want long-term, possibly lifetime, stability - not job hopping every few years

_____________________



ABOUT US

• U.S.-based company

• Small and close like family

• We value long-term tea
mbers who want stability and consistency 

• We recognize your hard work and reward you for your dedication and additional contributions 

_____________________



COMMITMENT

• Independent Contractor work setup directly with the client.

• Full-time (40 working hours/week)

• Availability Requirement: Monday–Friday, within timeframe of 7 AM–7 PM Pacific Time. (Plus helping with time-sensitive client matters as needed Saturday-Sunday)

• Long-term, possibly lifetime position

• $500–$800/month (based on experience) + Bonuses

_____________________



FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for average. We are looking for a confident, capable woman who:

• Can communicate clearly

• Can connect with people and make them feel comfortable on the phone

• Can think independently

• Wants to stay and grow long-term



If that’s you - apply here: Apply Here: 



If that's not you - this role will not be a fit.



OLJ Applications or OLJ Messages will not be reviewed.

Apply Here:

title: Experienced Email Template Designer for BetterMail Visual Editor
description:
We are looking for an experienced
 Template Designer to create original marketing
 templates inside BetterMail, our visual
 editor.



This is a 1-2 month part-time project to start. Future work may be available depending on BetterMail customer demand and the need for additional template/design support.



No HTML coding is required. You will build directly inside BetterMail’s drag-and-drop
 editor. BetterMail also has a built-in banner editor, which you will use to create editable banners for the templates.



The templates you create will become part of BetterMail’s free template collection for customers to use, so they must be original, polished, modern, responsive, and easy for users to customize.



Important:

As you build templates, we will also ask you to give feedback on the BetterMail editor. We are actively improving the editor, so your feedback about usability, missing features, difficult workflows, and template-building limitations will be valuable.



Initial Work:

Before creating the full set of templates, we will do a research and planning stage. You will help research and suggest a template category list. We already have some ideas and starting points, but we want your input on useful categories, industries, campaign types, and template styles.



Responsibilities:

- Research and suggest template categories for BetterMail’s free template collection

- Create original
 templates inside the BetterMail visual editor

- Use BetterMail’s built-in banner editor to create editable banners

- Create templates that demonstrate the flexibility of the BetterMail editor

- Make templates easy for customers to modify, adjust, and re-theme

- Design templates that look modern, clean, and professional

- Ensure templates look good on both desktop and mobile

- Create templates across different industries and campaign types

- Give clear feedback on the BetterMail editor while using it

- Revise templates based on feedback



Template Requirements:

- Must be original designs, not copied from existing templates

- Must be suitable for BetterMail customers to use as free templates

- Must be responsive and mobile-friendly

- Must use modern
 design practices, including strong hierarchy, large readable fonts, clean spacing, and clear calls to action

- Must be easy for users to edit and customize

- Must use editable banners where appropriate

- Must show a range of layouts, styles, and use cases so customers can see what BetterMail can do



Experience Required:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in
 template production,
 design, or digital marketing design

- Strong portfolio of
 templates or
 campaign designs

- Experience with tools such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Canva, Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar

- Strong understanding of
 design, mobile layout, typography, spacing, color, hierarchy, and CTA placement

- Comfortable using AI image/banner tools

- Able to create original ideas and not just copy existing designs

- Good written English

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work independently



Preferred:

- Experience designing templates for SaaS, ecommerce, newsletters, events, local businesses, real estate, restaurants, education, fitness, beauty, travel, or professional services

- Experience creating reusable template systems or template libraries

- Experience giving product feedback while using design software or
 editors



To apply, please answer these questions:

1. Put "BetterMail
 Designer" at the top of your application.

2. Send a link to your portfolio. Please include
 templates or
 campaign designs if possible.

3. How many years of
 template or
 campaign design experience do you have?

4. What
/design tools have you used?

5. Have you used Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Canva, Figma, or any drag-and-drop
 editor before?

6. Are you comfortable using AI tools and built-in banner editors to create editable banners?

7. How would you approach creating an original template library for BetterMail customers?

8. How many polished
 templates do you think you could create per week inside a visual editor?

9. What is your hourly rate?

10. Are you open to a paid test task?



Paid Test:

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to create a small number of sample
 templates inside BetterMail from a brief. This test will be paid.



We are looking for someone who can start part-time for 1-2 months.

title: Real Estate Lead Qualifier (Warm Leads | EST Shift)
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a disciplined and high-performing Lead Qualifier to manage our warm lead database. This is a targeted role focused on re-engaging property owners who have previously shown interest in selling.



This position requires a "prospecting athlete"—someone who can maintain high energy across a split-shift schedule to reach homeowners at peak response times. You will vet leads for motivation and property details before passing them to our senior acquisitions team.



The Schedule & Performance Standards

This role is strictly tied to Eastern Standard Time (EST). To maximize contact rates, you will work one or two of the following windows:



Morning: 8 AM – 10 AM EST



Mid-day: 12 PM – 2 PM EST



Evening: 5 PM – 8 PM EST



Success is measured by data. We are a KPI-driven (Key Performance Indicator) company. You will be expected to:



Maintain a consistent daily call volume (Expected: 250 dials per day).



Meet weekly targets for qualified leads and warm transfers.



Log all activity with 100?curacy in our CRM.



Required Qualifications

Real Estate Expertise: 1–2 years of experience in Real Estate cold calling or lead management is required.



Objection Mastery: You must be able to handle "not interested" or price objections with grace, curiosity, and persistence.



EST Availability: You must be fully available and alert during the specific split-shift hours listed above.



Technical Specs: Noise-canceling headset, stable high-speed internet, and a backup power solution.



Key Responsibilities

Call "Old Warm" leads to re-verify selling intent.



Qualify leads based on the 3 Pillars: Interest in selling, Price and Motivation.



Perform seamless warm transfers to the acquisitions team.



Overcome gatekeepers and stalls to reach the decision-maker.



Mandatory Paid Training
